ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Double Enemies
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 复制游戏中的大部分敌人，并使复制的首领共享生命值。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Duplicates most enemies in the game, and shares hp between duplicate bosses.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Keep lifeblood on bench
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 将生命精华保留在长凳上
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在长椅上休息时保留你的生命血，有助于避免在 P5 中意外消耗掉生命血层数。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Keeps your lifeblood when sitting on a bench, useful to not accidentally kill your lifeblood stack on P5.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: No More Shards
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个简单的模组，让每个面具碎片和容器碎片分别直接给你一个完整的面具或容器。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A simple mod that makes every mask shard and vessel fragment grant you a full mask or vessel respectively.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EnemiesFightingEachOther
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许玩家生成格鲁兹之母与蜂巢骑士，并让它们互相战斗。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows the player to spawn in Gruz Mother and Hive Knight and have them fight each other

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: VengeflyBombardier
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 《复仇蝇轰炸者》是一款《空洞骑士》模组，它将复仇蝇之王改造成更具攻击性的Boss战。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: VengeflyBombardier is a Hollow Knight mod that turns the Vengefly King into a much more aggressive boss encounter.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BossLib
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让制作Boss变得更简单。本身不提供任何功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes creating bosses easier. Does nothing on its own.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Lego Power Bricks
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为《空洞骑士》添加了多种标志性的红色乐高能量块，以免费护符的形式呈现。目前需要开启调试模式才能为自己添加这些护符。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds various of the iconic Red Lego Power Bricks to Hollow Knight, in the form of free charms. Currently requires Debug to give yourself the charms.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LieButton
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个简单的空洞骑士Mod。按下可自定义的按键即可切换躺下或站起状态。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A simple mod for Hollow Knight. Press a certain customizable key to lie down or get up, like a switch.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hollow Knight ACTS
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个将《丝之歌》的ACT系统移植到《空洞骑士》中的Mod。ACT位置基于Singbuzzordenethcut在YouTube上的视频。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod which adds SilkSongs ACT system to hk. Act positions based of Singbuzzordenethcut video on yt.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKTags
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个库模组，允许你设置和获取标签与属性。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library mod that allows you to set n' get tags and attributes

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Lifeblood
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 简单轻量的库模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Simple lightweight library mod

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Master
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 基于同名《泰拉瑞亚》模组制作的挑战模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Challenge mod based of a terraria mod of the same name

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Broken Nail
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为《空洞骑士》新增“断钉挑战”的存档模式。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a new save mode to hk for the Broken Nail challenge

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Vampire Knight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: A.. 吸血意志！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A.. BLOODSUCKING will!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BlueSR_OST
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将绿色小径、真菌荒地和封印容器战斗中的原声音乐替换为 BlueSR 的版本。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Replaces the Sound Tracks in Greenpath, Fungal Wastes and Sealed Vessel fight with BlueSR's version.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Ado Death Scream
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 当骑士死亡时播放阿多的尖叫声。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Plays Ado's scream when the Knight dies.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DeVect
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: DeVect，中文名为《骨杖寂骑人》，是一款将《杀戮尖塔》中“缺陷”风格的球体玩法融入《空洞骑士》骑士动作系统的Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: DeVect, titled 骨杖寂骑人 in Chinese, is a Hollow Knight mod that brings Defect-style orb gameplay from Slay the Spire into the Knight's moveset.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ReplayTimerMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 记录你在每个房间的最佳通关时间，并在下一次尝试中以幽灵形式回放。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Records your best times through each room and plays it back as a ghost on your next attempt.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: StubbornKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 固执骑士是一个关于固执骑士的模组。骑士的思维始终锁定在一个方向上；你只能朝它想要的方向攻击。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: StubbornKnight is a stubborn knight mod. The Knight's mind is always fixated on one direction; you can only attack in the direction it desires.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MossBeast
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: MossBeast 是将《以撒的结合》中的Boss战“野兽”完整移植到《空洞骑士》中的Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: MossBeast is a complete port of The Beast boss fight from The Binding of Isaac to Hollow Knight.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: StartingNotches
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你使用可调节数量的额外护符槽，默认从2个开始。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Lets you play with an adjustable amount of extra Charm Notches, default starts at 2.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EasierGeoEconomy
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你增加每次获取吉欧的数量。同时包含死亡时不损失吉欧的选项。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows you to multiply the amount gotten per geo piece. Also includes an option to not lose geo upon death.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PantheonArchitect
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在《空洞骑士》中设计并游玩自定义的万神殿5阵容！用任意顺序的任意Boss打造你的完美Boss连战，并通过简单代码与好友分享你的创作。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Design and play custom Pantheon 5 lineups in Hollow Knight! Create your perfect boss gauntlet with any bosses in any order, then share your creations with friends using simple codes.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HuKing
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 长者幽灵胡的模组Boss
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A modboss of Elder Ghost Hu

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Mythril Soul
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为《空洞骑士》新增一种游戏模式：永久死亡机制扩展至梦境领域，且当生命值等于或低于两格面具时禁用暂停功能（更难的钢铁之魂模式）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a new gamemode to Hollow Knight with permadeath expanded to dreams and pausing disabled at or below two masks (harder steel soul).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: U-tils
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: U-tale 制作与使用的实用工具
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Utilities by and for U-tale

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CharmReValance
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 护符与能力全面改造及自定义
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Charm and ability overhaul and customization

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DamageValuesRewritten
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 显示敌人受到伤害时的伤害数值
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Display damage values when enemies suffer damage

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MyHK
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个辅助《空洞骑士》的模组，能显著提升游戏体验。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An assisting mod for HK that can improve the gaming experience significantly

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Charm Editor
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此模组允许你修改护符槽数量与冲刺大师技能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod allows you to change charm notches and dashmaster

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Limitations
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 创造无休止的限制
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Create none endless limitations

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: OnlyBosses
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: OnlyBosses 是 TheHuntIsOn 敌人模块（用于移除基础敌人）的替代方案，但由于该模块已被移除，因此有了这个 Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: OnlyBosses is an alternative to TheHuntIsOn enemy module (which removes basic enemies), but since it got removed this mod is here.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GPZPractice
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此模组允许你配置佐特幼体的生成。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod allows you config spawning of Zotelings.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FrameLimiter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 可以将帧率限制为你想要的任何数值（对特定帧的跳过操作很有用）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Can limit fps to whatever you like (can be usefull for frame specific skips)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Faction Elimination
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为 HKMP 设计的自定义游戏模式，队伍之间收集升级道具并相互对战。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A custom gamemode for HKMP where teams collect upgrades and fight each other.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Shared Health
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个HKMP插件，用于在队伍间同步伤害与治疗。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A HKMP addon to synchronize damage and healing across teams.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SkinBenchRoulette
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 每次在长椅上休息时，随机更换你的自定义骑士皮肤！自动检测已下载的皮肤。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizes your Custom Knight skin every time you sit on a bench! Automatically detects your downloaded skins.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Wrong Gravity
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 圣巢？Hɐlloʍuǝsʇ！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Hallownest? Hɐlloʍuǝsʇ!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Uumuu Hack
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此模组将使乌姆在第二循环及之后，奎若打破其护盾前仅攻击一次。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod would make Uumuu only attack for once before Quirrel pops its shield from the second cycle on.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Quasar Radiance
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是《任何辐光 3.0》的一个大幅修改版本，旨在让休闲玩家玩得更开心、更享受，同时仍保留一定挑战性。战斗非常独特，不会像原版那样难到不可能通关。本模组建议在 300 FPS 上限下运行，如果帧数低于或高于此值，难度会比预期更高或更低。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A version of Any Radiance 3.0 that's heavily modified to be more fun and enjoyable by casual players while still providing some level of challenge. Very unique fight that's not impossibly hard like the real thing. The mod is meant to be played with a 300 FPS cap so if you play on lower or higher it's gonna be harder or easier than intended.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ScreenShakeService
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除屏幕震动：屏幕震动服务仅用于消除空洞骑士中多余的屏幕震动效果，因为这种震动会引发部分玩家不适。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes screen shake: Screen Shake Service simply supports slashing Scooped Swordsman's (Hollow Knight's) superfluous screen shake since said shaking stimulates some souls' squeamishness.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Bonfire
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 空洞骑士中的升级系统，带来更真实的黑暗之魂体验（一款知名的空洞骑士仿作）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A level-up system in Hollow Knight for a more realistic Dark Souls experience (a well-known Hollow Knight ripoff).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Lightbringer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 重大游戏玩法革新：手持光之长枪，携带全新护符与光辉法术，在圣巢中杀出一条血路，追寻那困扰我们梦境的束缚之光。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Major gameplay overhaul: fight your way through Hallownest with a lance of light, brand new charms and radiant spells to seek the binding light that plagues our dreams.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Exaltation
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 实现了被废弃的“护符升华”机制：通过推进神居的进度来强化你的护符。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Implements the scrapped mechanic of "charm glorification": empower your charms by progressing through Godhome.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Pale Shadow
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 自制纯净容器 Boss Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Homemade Pure Vessel boss mod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: INFINITY
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个纯粹容器 Boss Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A pure vessel boss mod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Floor is Lava
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个为《空洞骑士》制作的“地板是熔岩”Mod。请阅读 Read.me 文件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Is a floor is lava mod for Hollow Knight. PLease read Read.me

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Omega Radiance
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 面对力量之神，这是“任何辐光”的修改版本，其目的并非增加难度，而是打造一场酷炫且独特的战斗。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Face the god of power, a modified version of Any Radiance which was made not to be harder but to be a cool and unique fight.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Sunset Rad
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 模组化辐光
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Modded Radiance

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PURITY
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 《落日轮回 II》新版本。模组化辐光。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: New Version of "Sunset Samsara II". Modded Radiance.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Pure Shape
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 修改玩家的法术和剑技，玩家可以使用类似纯粹容器（Pure Container）的技能，例如格挡反击。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Changes the player's spell and nail arts, players can use skills similar to pure containers, such as blocking counterattacks.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Castless Focus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 防止轻触聚焦键时施放技能。（注意：此设置会使轻触聚焦键始终开始聚焦，延迟时间与长按相同）
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Stops the focus button from casting when tapped. (Note: This causes tapping the focus button to always start the focus, with the same delay as if it was held)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoBoardReplay
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一款为宾果锦标赛组织者设计的Mod，可在玩家存在直播延迟时协助转播游戏面板。使用方法请参阅GitHub说明文档。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod for bingo tournament organizers to help restream the board when the players have stream delay. See GitHub readme for usage.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ModCommon
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为空洞骑士模组提供辅助工具和其他实用功能的API模组。 不建议在新模组中使用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A hollow knight mod that provides an API of helpers and other utilities for modding hollow knight. Not recommended for use in new mods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GrubDay2026Plando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 2026年幼虫节联机Mod的同伴Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Companion Mod for the 2026 grubday plando

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PedroSoulOrb
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个空洞骑士Mod，当你的灵魂值满时，会显示一个朋友。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that renders a friend when you have full soul

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RngCounters
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个空洞骑士模组，用于统计烦人位置上的随机数生成（RNG）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that counts RNG in annoying spots.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RgbRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化连接器，可对着色器的 RGB 值进行随机化处理。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer connection that allows randomization of RGB values for the shader.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LoadRandomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将加载时间随机化在0到10之间，数值越低出现概率越高。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizes load times from 0 to 10, weighted towards lower values.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoGoalPackSpleengy
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为锁定模式设计的备用宾果目标包
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An alternate bingo goalpack designed for the lockout format

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BrokeLocUtil
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于解锁无法到达的随机位置调试扩展
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A debug extension to grant unreachable rando locations

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DeathSync
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于同步死亡机制的 ItemSync/MultiWorld 扩展模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An ItemSync/MultiWorld extension to link your deaths

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NotBackgroundObjectRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 没有丝之歌对社区的影响
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: What no Silksong does to a community

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EverySceneUtil
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于在游戏每个场景中运行代码的开发者工具
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A developer tool for running code on every scene in the game

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RegretRecoveryRestoration
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化连接模组，可在蛋商店移除暗影后恢复回收暗影的能力。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer connection which restores the ability to recover your shade when egg shop removes it

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: TheRealTransitionRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化连接模组，将过渡点与其他物品放入同一池中。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer connection that puts transitions into the same pool as the other items

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CorpseDreamRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化器连接模组，为背景尸体添加了梦之钉对话。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer connection that adds dream nail dialogue for background corpses

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NetworkingPlando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个为 Networking plando 制作的补充模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A supplemental mod for the Networking plando

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MoreStags
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化连接，新增了新的鹿角站。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer connection which adds new stag stations

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AlphabetRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 游戏界面中字母的随机化连接
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer connection for the letters in the UI of the game itself

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RecentItemsDisplayNoOneEssence
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 近期物品显示无一人精华
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为 RecentItemsDisplay 添加一个可切换的过滤器，用于移除 1 点梦之精华的检查项。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a togglable filter to remove 1 Essence checks from RecentItemsDisplay

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RecentItemsDisplayNoGeo
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 最近物品显示无地理信息
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为 RecentItemsDisplay 添加一个可切换的过滤器，以移除 GeoRando 的检查项。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a togglable filter to remove GeoRando checks from RecentItemsDisplay

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GeoRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为每一枚吉欧提供随机化连接
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer connection for every individual piece of geo

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Wingy
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为无爪宾基社区制作的补充模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Supplemental mod for the clawless bingy community

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: YetAnotherRandoConnection
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化模组的扩展包，包含多种新增内容
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer add-on with an assortment of additions

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BaldurRngConfig
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 配置各种长辈巴尔德尔的设置
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Configure various Elder Baldur settings

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: WrathOfTheSwarm
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将聚集虫群作为武器使用
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Use Gathering Swarm as a weapon

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SkillCharms
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 技能现在可以装备为护符
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Skills are now equippable charms

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: VendorRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化模组的扩展，用于随机化商贩的物理位置。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer add-on that randomizes the physical locations of vendors

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RainbowFlukes
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 蛞蝓变成彩虹色了！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The flukes are rainbow!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PermaFlukes
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Flukes 不再消失
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Flukes don't disappear

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GloriousGrimmMusic
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在整个战斗中，聆听格林主题曲更为激烈的层次。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Listen to the more intense layer of Grimm's theme for the whole fight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GarfieldStorage
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这个模组不言自明。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod explains itself

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DebugCharms
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个专门针对护符的调试扩展
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Debug extension specifically for charms

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ShuffledCharmEffects
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 装备的护符将获得随机效果
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Equipped charms will have randomized effects

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Flukemaster
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 所有法术都会受到小浮虫巢的影响
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: All spells are affected by flukenest

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EndlessIBaldur
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于练习无道具巴尔德的 Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod for practicing itemless baldur

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Marmalade
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 辐光会生成马穆，而不是光球。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Radiance spawns Marmu instead of orbs

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Pogonest
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 弹跳一切
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Pogo anything

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: IntangibleShadow
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 暗影披风几乎可以穿过任何东西
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Shade Cloak can go through just about anything

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomPlayerModel
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将你的骑士精灵替换为3D模型
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Replace your knight sprite with a 3D model

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: InfiniteMapMarkers
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为什么要止步于每种地图标记6个呢
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Why stop at 6 of each map marker

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ShadesAnywhere
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 梦魇、白色宫殿和神居中可以生成暗影。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A shade can spawn in dreams, White Palace, and Godhome

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BetterModList
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 自定义模组列表的显示方式
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Customize how the mod list is displayed

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: UnconstrainedRotation
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 骑士可以自由旋转
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The knight can rotate freely

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FlappyKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是《空洞骑士》版的《Flappy Bird》。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: It's Flappy Bird but in Hollow Knight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Taxes
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 你所有的吉欧
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: All your geo means all your geo

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Archiv
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 教师档案馆里有些不对劲
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Something is amiss in Teacher's Archives

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AlwaysWorldSense
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 立即获得世界感知
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Grants World Sense immediately

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoGoalPack2
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为自定义BingoSync挑战添加更精细的规格设置。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds more granular specifications for custom BingoSync challenges

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: KeybindOverhaul
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 增强了按键绑定自定义功能，支持分离动作、按键组合以及重复输入。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Enhances keybind customization with split actions, key combos, and duplicate inputs

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MidasTouch
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 华丽躯壳掉落一个护符，可将敌人变为黄金。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Gorgeous Husk drops a charm that turns enemies to gold

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HkmpTransitionAlerts
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个HKMP插件，用于高亮最近使用的过渡区域。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An HKMP addon to highlight recently used transitions

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CycloneCopter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 延长旋风斩以实现升空
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Extend your cyclone to achieve liftoff

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PogoableFlukes
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 你可以利用你的小粪球施法进行弹跳。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: You can pogo off your flukenest casts

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AdBlocker
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 屏蔽广告
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Blocks ads

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: VoiceToCrySuffering
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 对纯粹容器战斗的小调整
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A minor tweak to the Pure Vessel fight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PlayerTrail
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个 HKMP 扩展模组，可为部分玩家身后添加一条拖尾特效。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An HKMP addon to add a lingering trail behind some players

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: KeepDiveIFrames
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 现在你可以再次利用无敌帧进行下砸连击了
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Now you can abuse i-frames for dive spam again

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: UnlimitedHiveblood
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为蜂巢之血与国王之魂/虚空之心添加协同效果，实现无限再生。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds synergy between Hiveblood and Kingsoul/Voidheart for unlimited regen

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MilliGolf
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个18洞的高尔夫球场，主角是米莉贝尔高尔夫球
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An 18-hole course featuring Millibelle the Golf Ball

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NoTransitions
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 不完整、有缺陷的演示版本。更多信息请查看 ReadMe 文件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: INCOMPLETE, BROKEN, DEMO VERSION. View ReadMe for more info

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: WorseSteadyBody
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 稳定之躯现在拥有更一致的效果
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Steady Body now has a more consistent effect

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DynamicCrystalDash
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 根据蓄力时间长短缩放超级冲刺的速度
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Scales the speed of cdash by how long you charge it

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SaferWhitePalace
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你移除白宫的陷阱
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows you to remove the dangers of White Palace

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Elderbugnest
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将一群NPC替换成那位可爱的老朋友。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Replaces a bunch of NPCs with the sweet old friend

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoGoalPack1
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为BingoSync添加更多目标，并包含新的棋盘类型
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds more goals to BingoSync and includes new board types

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoSyncExtension
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此前用于为BingoSync添加额外自动标记逻辑，现已弃用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Previously used to add extra automarking logic to BingoSync, now deprecated

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SiblingClimb
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除灯塔攀爬中的平台。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes platforms from the lighthouse climb.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: UnlimitedShades
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 多个暗影可以共存，因此吉欧永远不会真正丢失。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Multiple shades can coexist, so geo is never truly lost.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PersistentDivine
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个模组，使迪万的帐篷在放逐格林剧团后仍留在德特茅斯，这样你就不会意外错过获得不毁护符的机会。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that keeps Divines tent in Dirtmouth even after you banish the Grimm Troupe so you don't accidentally miss the chance to get unbreakable charms

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DarkerTransitions
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将明亮的屏幕过渡效果变为黑色。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Turns bright screen transitions black.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Pale Court
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 挑战圣巢最强大的冠军，在宏伟的战斗中一决高下！ 用强大的新护符战胜你的对手！ 发现新的秘密与故事！ 一切尽在令人惊叹的全新配乐中！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Challenge Hallownest's mightiest champions in grand combat! Overcome your opponents with powerful new charms! Discover new secrets and stories! All with an incredible new soundtrack!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FiendMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个空洞骑士模组，将“愚者”替换为“恶魔”。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that replaces the word fool with fiend

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Floor Time Counter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加一个计数器，记录你接触地面的帧数。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a counter for how many frames you've touched the ground.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Snom
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 美化模组，将游戏中的提克提克替换为雪吞虫。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Cosmetic mod that replaces Tiktiks in the game with Snoms

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Grub Names
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: ItemChanger/Randomizer 4 的附加模组，将幼虫名称替换为 Skurry 的幼虫名称。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: ItemChanger/Randomizer 4 add-on that replaces Grub names with Skurry's Grub names

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hallownest-Vocalized
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为《空洞骑士》的所有游戏内对话添加英语配音。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds English voice acting to all Hollow Knight's in-game dialogue.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hallownest-Vocalized-AudioLoader
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 《空洞骑士-语音化-音频加载器》
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 空洞骑士语音化的依赖项。如果你还没下载，请与主模组一同下载！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A dependency for Hallownest Vocalized. Download this with the main mod if you haven't!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Disable Low Health Vignette
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 禁用低血量暗角效果。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Disables the low health vignette.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Remove Haunted Foes
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 该 Mod 已被“更好的神居音乐”取代。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod has been replaced by Better Godhome Music

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Better Godhome Music
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将“幽魂敌人”替换为新的“神居”版本Boss曲目（由我制作）
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Replaces Haunted Foes with new Godhome versions of boss tracks (made by me)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: STFUGrimmChild
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让格林之子闭嘴
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: makes grimm child stfu

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Core.FsmUtil
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于FSM编辑的库模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library mod for fsm editing.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Fyrenest
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 新增30个护符，并带来全新探索内容！完整地图重制功能现正逐步回滚。若想继续体验地图改动，请勿更新或从代码库获取最新版本。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds 30 new charms and creates new things to explore! The full map recreation is now being rolled back. If you want to continue playing with the map changes, either don't update or get the latest version off the repository.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Mash Dash
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 连续冲刺，速度更快，无需冷却
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Dash continually, faster, and without need for refresh

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Mash Slash
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 以你能按按钮的最快速度挥动骨钉
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Swing the nail as fast as you can mash the button

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Charm Crab
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 新的护符机制、新护符、新法术以及平衡调整
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: New Charm Mechanics, New Charms, New Spells, and Rebalances

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Nightmare Spark
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加一个格林剧团主题的护符，并包含多种护符协同效果。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a Grimm Troupe themed charm with various charm synergies.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Breakable Wall Randomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 空洞骑士随机化模组的可破坏墙壁扩展。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight Randomizer add-on for breakable walls.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Heal On Wall
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使您可以在墙壁上回血
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes it so you can Heal On Walls

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Better Void Heart
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 当你获得虚空之心时，保留王之灵魂的灵魂恢复效果。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Keep Kingsoul soul regen when you pick up Void Heart.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RadianceExtras
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为纯粹辐光战斗添加额外内容
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds Extra Things to the Abs Rad Fight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Lost Artifacts
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为《空洞骑士》添加强力神器的模组，这些神器散布于圣巢各处，可装备在骨钉上！兼容随机化4。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that adds powerful artifacts scattered all across Hallownest that can be equipped to the nail! Compatible with Randomizer 4.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Dead Quirrel
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 他已经死了。别再自欺欺人了。现在支持显示他是否还戴着面具。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: He's dead. Stop being in denial. Now featuring support for whether or not he has a mask.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Challenge Mode
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为神居添加随机挑战修饰器的模组，提供多种自定义选项。关于修饰器及更多信息请参阅 ReadMe 文件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that adds randomly selected challege modifiers to Godhome with several customization options. See ReadMe for info on modifiers and more.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FallDamage
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 玩家受到的坠落伤害与最大生命值和坠落时间成正比。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Player takes fall damage proportional to their max health and time spent falling.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ExtraMenuBackgrounds
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在额外菜单中添加了5个新的主菜单主题。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds 5 new main menu themes to the Extras menu.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HueShifter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使用着色器改变圣巢的颜色。也可以让一切变成彩虹。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Uses shaders to change Hallownest's colours. Can also make everything rainbows.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CriticalSlash
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使骨钉技艺在最早时机释放时造成额外伤害并更快恢复控制。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes nail arts deal extra damage and return control faster if released at the earliest moment.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Mask Maker Notches
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个在面具制作人房间中添加几个可购买护符槽的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that adds a few buyable Charm Notches in Mask Maker's room.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CelesteKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 蔚蓝移动方式：冲刺、超级跳、超级冲刺、蹬墙跳
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Celeste movements like dash, super, hyper, wallbounce

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Seer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Seer Modded Boss → 先知 Boss 模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Seer Modded Boss

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AnyZote
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 史上最强的左特模组Boss。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Most powerful zote modded boss ever.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AbsoluteZote
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个新的 GPZ 模组 Boss。同时安装 AbsoluteZote 和 PureZote 即可启用 AnyZote。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A new GPZ mod boss. Install AbsoluteZote and PureZote together to enable AnyZote.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Nailgod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 斯莱模组Boss。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Sly modded boss.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ZoteCollectorHelper
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 对灰色王子佐特和飞升收藏家进行了调整，例如佐特幼虫的生命值等。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Tweaks to Grey Prince Zote and ascended Collector, like the HP of zotelings and more.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HitboxOnly
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 仅显示碰撞框并隐藏所有精灵。这为多个 Boss 提供了全新体验，因为攻击预兆将不再可见。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Show only hitboxes and hide all sprites. This provides a new experience for several bosses since attack anticipation is no longer visible.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PureZote
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 启用了灰色王子左特召唤永恒试炼并升级了其技能。同时安装AbsoluteZote和PureZote以启用AnyZote。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Enabled Grey Prince Zote to summon Eternal Ordeal and upgraded its skills. Install AbsoluteZote and PureZote together to enable AnyZote.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: niaPfohtaP (PoP Upside Down)
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将痛苦之路上下颠倒。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes Path of Pain upside down.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SteelSoulHUD
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在普通模式中启用钢魂 HUD。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Enables the Steel Soul HUD in normal mode.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Transcendence
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 新增15个拥有不同能力的护符，可与随机化模式兼容使用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds 15 new charms with various abilities. Can be used with the randomizer.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RainbowEggs
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化模组附加组件，让腐臭蛋变得更加色彩缤纷。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A randomizer add-on that makes Rancid Eggs more colorful.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandoZoomZoom
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化模组附加组件，可让前期移动和吉欧收集速度稍快一些。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A randomizer add-on that makes early movement and geo collection a bit faster.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BenchwarpSpoilerCloak
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 长椅传送 剧透斗篷
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个长椅传送的附加模组，可在菜单中隐藏尚未访问过的长椅名称。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Benchwarp add-on that hides yet-to-be-visited bench names in the menu.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: QoL
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个包含多种生活品质改进的合集。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A collection of various quality of life improvements.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ScreenshotMachine
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于更好地制作空洞骑士截图的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod to better create Hollow Knight screenshots.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AsciiCamera
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为摄像机应用着色器，使游戏画面以ASCII字符形式输出。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Applies a shader to the camera which makes the game output as ascii characters.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HollowTwitch
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许Twitch聊天使用大量命令，为游戏增添趣味和变化。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows Twitch Chat to use tons of commands that spice up and vary gameplay.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Darkness
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将每个房间变为黑暗房间（类似于没有灯笼时所需的房间）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes every room into a dark room (akin to rooms which require lantern without it).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: God Soul
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让游戏变得极其困难
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes the game really, really hard

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Random Pantheons
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化神居的万神殿，使Boss以随机顺序出现。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizes Godhome’s Pantheons so bosses appear in random order.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Mantis Gods
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 大幅增强了螳螂领主的战斗。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Significantly buffs the Mantis Lords fight.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Sanic
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许改变游戏时间流速。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows changing the game timescale.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ModConsole
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 游戏内C#交互式编程环境，可让你轻松测试代码。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: In-game C# REPL which allows you to easily test code.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: The Pain of the Path
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许玩家反向完成痛苦之路，从最终下落至国王傀儡处上方开始。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows the player to complete the Path of Pain backwards, starting just above the final drop to the Kingsmoulds.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Pale Prince
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 对纯粹容器战斗进行全面重制，大幅提升难度。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Overhaul of the Pure Vessel fight with a significant increase in difficulty

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Vasi
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个包含一些实用类的库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library with some utility classes.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hell Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 对玩家进行多项削弱，并增强敌人属性，以提升游戏难度。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Various nerfs to the player and buffs to the enemies to increase the game difficulty.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HowwowKnyight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将《空洞骑士》中的所有文字（包括菜单、用户界面和游戏内对话）都翻译成更高级的UwU语言！OwO
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Twanswates aww of de text in Howwow Knyight into de much supewiow UwU wanguage, incwuding menyus, usew intewface and in-game diawogues! OwO

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Transtrans
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 跨性别权利的提克提克
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Tiktiks for trans rights

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Additional Timelines
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在制作人员名单结束后，为统计界面添加额外的时间线。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds extra timelines to the stats screen after the end credits.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GrassyKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 追踪并显示你割了多少草。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Tracks and shows you how much grass you've cut.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CompassAlwaysOn
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使骑士的图标始终显示在地图上，即使你的背包中没有迷路指南针。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes it so the Knight's icon always appears on the map, even if Wayward Compass isn't in your inventory.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GatheringSwarmAlwaysOn
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 即使没有装备“聚集虫群”护符，也能自动收集吉欧。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes it so geo is collected with Gathering Swarm, even if the charm isn't in your inventory.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Kronk
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于速通的简易物品计数器。主要用于Kronk%规则（所有拉杆收集）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Simple object counter used for speedruns. Mainly used for Kronk% (all levers).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: KeybindChaos
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在一定（可配置）时间后随机化按键绑定。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomize the keybinds after a certain (configurable) amount of time has passed.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Enemy Randomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化敌人及相关内容的 Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod for randomizing the enemies and related things.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Menderbug's Revenge
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 每当你破坏一个背景物体时，杀死骑士。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Kill the knight whenever you break a background object.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Godseeker Memory Jump
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在梦之钉攻击寻神者时面朝右侧，即可传送至隐藏记忆，即使你已到过该区域。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Face right when dreamnailing the godseeker to warp to the hidden memory, even if you've been there before.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoUI
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机生成器与速通宾果赛中的宾果目标自动追踪。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Automatic tracking of bingo goals for randomizer and speedrun bingo races.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EssenceAlways
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 选择在击杀敌人时（如果你拥有梦之钉）总是或从不掉落梦境精华。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Choose between always or never dropping an essence when killing an enemy (if you have dream nail).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Invincibility Monitor
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在某些场景中提供无敌效果。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Grants invincibility in some scenarios.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MylaFlower
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 给米拉带去一朵花，保护她免受感染。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Protect Myla from the infection by bringing her a flower.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SkillUpgrades
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 提供一系列骑士技能升级与调整。前往模组菜单启用它们。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Provides a collection of upgrades and tweaks to the Knight's Skills. Visit the Mod Menu to enable them.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CondensedSpoilerLogger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在 Rando Logs 目录下生成一份浓缩剧透日志（以及若干其他日志），包含该种子存档的关键信息。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Creates a Condensed Spoiler Log (and several others) in the Rando Logs directory with the key information about the seed.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SkiploverSpoilerLog
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在 Rando Logs 目录中创建一个 Skiplover 剧透日志，显示启用所有跳过技巧后可到达的区域。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Creates a Skiplover Spoiler Log in the Rando Logs directory showing what would be reachable with All skips enabled.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DapperMapperSpoils
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在精简剧透日志中新增一个类别，显示13张地图的位置。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a category to the condensed spoiler log which shows the locations of the 13 maps.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NotSpikesmas
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在随机化池中添加一个物品，可防止尖刺伤害。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds an item to the randomization pool that protects against damage from spikes.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandoPlus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4 的附加模组，增加了更多随机化选项；例如，随机化蘑菇先生的位置。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add-on for Randomizer 4 that adds more Randomization options; for example, randomize Mr Mushroom locations.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FountainPreview
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: ItemChanger 的附加组件，使盆地喷泉显示其将要给予的物品。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add-on for ItemChanger that makes the basin fountain show the item it's going to give.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Randomizable Levers
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4 的附加模组，新增了随机化拉杆的选项。在 Randomizer 4 的“连接”菜单中激活拉杆随机化功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizer 4 addon that adds the option to randomize levers. Activate lever rando in the Connections menu of Randomizer 4.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Rope Rando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在随机Mod 4中添加了守望者骑士Boss房间中的绳索/吊灯。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds the rope / chandelier in the Watcher Knights boss room to Randomizer 4.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: TrandoPlus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4 的附加模组，为过渡随机化功能增加了更多选项；例如，可仅随机化门口过渡。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add-on for Randomizer 4 that adds more options to Transition Rando; for example, randomize only doorway transitions.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RecentItemsDisplay
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: ItemChanger（及Rando）的附加组件，可在屏幕右上角显示最近获得的拾取物。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add-on for ItemChanger (and Rando) which displays recently obtained pickups in the top-right of the screen.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandomizerSettingsRandomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4 的附加组件，可让你随机化设置。关于如何选择要随机化的设置，请参阅 README 文件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add-on for Randomizer 4 that allows you to randomize settings. See the README for info on how to select settings to randomize.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Scatternest
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为随机化器和物品同步功能添加插件，允许玩家从多个不同地点开始游戏。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Addon for Randomizer and ItemSync allowing players to start at multiple different locations.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ContainerConfig
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: ItemChanger 的附加组件，用于控制特定检查点的呈现方式。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Addon for ItemChanger to control how certain checks are presented.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ReopenCityDoor
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 打开真菌荒地和城市之间上锁的门（位于胡长老坟墓上方 / 靠近通往十字路口的电梯）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Opens the locked door between Fungal Wastes and City (above Elder Hu's grave / near the elevator to Crossroads).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FStats
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在制作人员名单画面后显示一些关于本次通关的数据统计。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Displays some stats about a run after the credits screen.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: InfoPanelUtil
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于通过 DebugMod 创建信息面板的工具。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Utils for creating info panels through DebugMod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PlayerDataManager
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 覆盖玩家数据值（例如，始终将 `hasQuill` 设置为 false）。拥有 DebugMod 会有所帮助，但并非必需。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Override player data values (for example, always set `hasQuill` to false). Having DebugMod is helpful, but not required.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Benchwarp
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于选择并传送至长椅的模组。同时支持放置长椅及传送至房间过渡点。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod for selecting and warping to benches. Also allows placing benches and warping to room transitions.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Randomizer 4
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于随机化物品和/或过渡的模组，提供多种自定义选项。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod for randomizing items and/or transitions, with numerous customization options.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ItemChanger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于处理其他模组编辑物品和位置的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod which handles editing items and locations for other mods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MenuChanger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于处理其他模组修改主菜单的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod which handles editing the main menu for other mods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandomizerCore
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化逻辑与算法库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library for randomizer logic and algorithms.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandomizerCore.Json
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为RandomizerCore添加JSON编码逻辑数据支持的库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library which adds support for json-encoded logic data to RandomizerCore.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ItemChangerDataLoader
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于创建随机化存档备份并启动预设存档的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod for creating backups of randomizer saves and launching plandos.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ICExtraDeployers
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: ItemChanger 附加组件，可预加载更多对象。适用于需要放置自定义巴德尔、门等元素的 IC 文件，作为其依赖项使用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: ItemChanger add-on which preloads more objects. Use as a dependency for IC files which place custom Baldurs, gates, and more.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomPoolInjector
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个为 Randomizer 4 制作的附加模组，用于提供用户自定义的物品池，以随机化不同的物品组合。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for providing user-defined item pools for randomizing different item combinations.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomLogicInjector
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为随机化4提供用户自定义逻辑编辑的附加组件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for providing user-defined logic edits.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomGroupInjector
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个为不同分组随机化选项提供用户自定义物品组的 Randomizer 4 附加组件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for providing user-defined item groups for different split group randomizer options.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomConstraintInjector
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个为 Randomizer 4 设计的附加模组，用于对放置位置设置用户自定义限制，并编辑物品和地点的优先级权重。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for providing user-defined constraints on placements and for editing priority weights for items and locations.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BenchRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个为《随机化4》制作的附加模组，用于将长椅随机分布到新位置，并将传送至长椅的能力随机化为可拾取物品。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer 4 add-on for randomizing benches to new locations and randomizing the ability to warp to benches as items.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ItemSync
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个 RandomizerMod 4 的附加模组，用于在玩家之间共享物品拾取。默认 IP 已不再可用。如果你想连接到公共服务器，请使用 `mw.hkmp.org`。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A RandomizerMod 4 add-on for sharing item pickups between players. The default IP no longer works. Please use `mw.hkmp.org` if you want to connect to the public server.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MultiWorld
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个 RandomizerMod 4 的附加组件，用于在所有世界之间分配玩家的物品。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A RandomizerMod 4 add-on for distributing players' items between all their worlds.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MultiWorldLib
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于物品同步与多世界网络传输的库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library for ItemSync and MultiWorld network transmission.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PaletteSwapper
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 修改房间色调的 Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod which changes room color tint.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: InfiniteNotches
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 可切换的模组，用于启用无限护符槽。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Togglable mod for enabling infinite charm notches.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EasyMode
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 可切换模组，让游戏稍微简单一点。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Togglable mod for making the game slightly easier.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LoadNormalizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将加载扩展至用户自定义上限，以同步竞速中的加载过程。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod which extends loads to a user-defined cap, to synchronize loading for races.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AdditionalMaps
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加了白色宫殿和神居的地图。白色宫殿的地图位于大房间的长椅旁，神居的地图则放在万神殿上方的长椅边。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds white palace and godhome maps. The white palace one is next to the bench in the big room. The godhome one is next to the bench above the pantheons.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BenchWarpFix
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 当使用长椅传送进入没有长椅的场景时，不会导致软锁，而是将你传送到泥土之口。可能不适用于有漏洞的速通流程。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: When benchwarping into a scene without a bench, instead of softlock drops you into dirtmouth. Probably doesn't work with glitched runs.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BlindRadiance
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在选定场景中使背景更暗，以增强前景物体的可见度。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes background darker in selected scenes to make foreground objects more visible.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CarefreeRngReset
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 该模组会在玩家每次进入诸神殿堂时，将无忧旋律的随机数重置为最高格挡概率。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod resets carefree melody rng to highest likelyhood of blocking each time the player enters the hall of gods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ColosseumTrophy
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 重新启用竞技场奖杯的删减内容。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Reenables the colosseum trophy cut content.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CursedMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这个模组包含各种杂项功能。例如让游戏窗口在 Windows 系统下显示为深色模式。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod does miscellaneous stuff. Like making the game window be dark mode on windows.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomBgm
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许自定义背景音乐。具体操作方法请参阅其说明文档。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows customization of background music. See its readme for a how-to.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomSaveArt
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让白色宫殿的保存点艺术变得有趣。仅此而已。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes white palace save art funny. Literally nothing else.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EnemyChanger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许导出并替换敌人贴图。具体操作方法请参阅自述文件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows to dump and replace enemy textures. Refer to the readme on how to do that.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FireIsSmolBrain
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在德特茅斯添加一个灵魂图腾，并封锁Boss战斗区域。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a soul totem to dirtmouth and blocks off boss arenas.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FullSpeedAhead
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除格挡减速。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes Parry Slow-Down.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FuryFix
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 尝试修复1点生命值时狂怒的存档问题。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Tries to fix fury for 1 max health saves.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GeoLog
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 记录游戏中所有吉欧的位置。启动时扫描整个游戏。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Logs all geo locations in the game. Goes through the entire game on startup.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GraphicOptions
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加了“一些”图形选项。其中部分选项“可能”在更改时不稳定。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a "few" graphics options. Some of those "might" be unstable to change.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKHKHKHKHK
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: VVVVVVV 风格的《空洞骑士》Mod。按 R 键翻转重力。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: VVVVVVV but in HK. Flip gravity with the R key.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HollowKnightAchievementManager
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 管理《空洞骑士》成就的工具，支持原版与模组成就。同时可将成就同步至所选在线平台（GOG、Steam、XBox）。此外还能解锁/锁定菜单主题与游戏模式。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows to manage Hollow Knight achievements, both vanilla and modded. Also syncs them with the online store of choice (GOG, Steam, XBox). Also allows to un-/lock menu themes and game modes.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LanguageSupport
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 支持更多语言。但尚未支持某些其他语言的字符。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows additional languages to be supported. Doesn't allow for some characters of other languages yet.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MenuThemesInGame
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将菜单颜色校正应用于游戏过程中。破坏沉浸感。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Applies the menu color correction to gameplay. Breaks immersion.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MoreHealing
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加更多治疗类护符。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds more healing charms.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MoreMapMarkers
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加可配置的更多地图标记。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds configurably more map markers.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MoreMasks
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 增加可显示的护符槽数量，同样适用于生命血护符。默认每行显示28个护符槽，可通过编辑本模组的全局设置文件进行调整。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes more masks available to be displayed. Also works for lifeblood masks. By default it shows 28 masks per row. Can be adjusted by editing the globalsettings file of this mod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MoreNotches
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使更多护符槽位可显示。同样适用于过载护符与护符详情槽位。默认显示最多50个已装备槽位和20个护符详情槽位。可通过编辑本模组的全局设置文件进行调整。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes more charm notches available to be displayed. Also works for overcharm and charm detail notches. By default it shows up to 50 equipped notches and 20 charm detail notches. Can be adjusted by editing the globalsettings file of this mod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NailsmithBackPay
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 升级骨钉后，可从钉匠处取回花费的吉欧。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Get your geo back from the nailsmith after upgrading your nail.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NeverMuffle
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除受到伤害时的低沉音效。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes the muffling sound effect when taking damage.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PeakingPeekingPeaks
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此模组旨在让水晶山峰的名字更令人难忘。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mods aims to make the Crystal Peak name more memorable.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PvpArena
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 本模组在德特茅斯长椅右侧添加了一个带有隐形入口的PvP竞技场。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod adds a PvP arena with an invisible entrance right of the bench in Dirtmouth.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RadiantMenu
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为游戏添加了一个光辉的菜单主题。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a radiant menu theme to the game.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RedoBirthplace
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 重制诞生之地的过场动画。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Redo the Birthplace cutscene.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ResetCharmNotches
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 重置护符槽和护符槽消耗。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Reset charm notches and charm notch cost.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ScenePainter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 生成游戏中所有场景的SVG图像。可通过按K键手动触发。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Creates SVG images of all scenes in the game. Can be initiated manually using the K key.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ScreenResolution
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 增加更多可用的屏幕分辨率选项。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds more available screen resolution options.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SFCore
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 其他 Mod 使用的库 Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Library mod used by other mods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ShowFPS
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个在右下角添加FPS显示的Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that adds a FPS display in the bottom right corner.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SpriteDumper
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于导出精灵图的模组。每次导出可能需要超过10分钟。按P键开始导出。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that dumps sprites. Can take more than 10 minutes per dump. Uses the P key to initiate dumping.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: StoriesOfaHkPlayer-Ch1
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 一个香港玩家的故事-第一章
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个空洞骑士玩家与其个性化游戏副本的故事开端。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The start of a story of a Hollow Knight player and his personalized copy of the game.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: StoriesOfaHkPlayer-Ch2
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 一个HK玩家的故事-第二章
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 空洞骑士玩家与其个性化游戏副本故事的第二章。 直播此Mod的玩家请注意：此Mod会显示你的Windows/Mac/Linux用户名。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The second iteration of a story of a Hollow Knight player and his personalized copy of the game. Warning for people streaming this mod: This mod displays your windows/mac/linux username.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SvgLib
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于 .NET Framework 和 .NET Core 的 SVG 解析与合成库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: SVG parser and composer library for .NET Framework and .NET Core.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: TestOfTeamwork
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为白宫添加了一段痛苦之路风格的区域。 首先与德特茅斯及其周边的人物对话。 这是一个单人游戏模组。“团队合作”指的是游戏内的事件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a Path of Pain style section to the White Palace. Start by talking to people in and around dirtmouth. This is a singleplayer mod. The "teamwork" refers to in-game events.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: VoidHeartMenu
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让虚空之心版文字在PC版游戏中显示。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes the Voidheart edition text appear on pc versions of the game.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: WavLib
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于读写WAV文件的库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library to read and write WAV files.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: WideCamera
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 实现超宽屏无黑边显示。理论上也应适用于比16:9更窄或更高的屏幕比例。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Make ultrawide screens possible without black bars. Should also work for thinner/taller than 16:9. In theory.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ZaliantsSurprise
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是 Zaliant 提出的一个 Mod 创意。 原描述： 这是苍白庭院 Mod。 尽情享受吧！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This is a mod idea by Zaliant. Former Description: This is the Pale Court mod. Enjoy!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandomGravityChange
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个可以定期或通过按键随机改变重力的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that randomly changes gravity periodically or on key press.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandomTeleport
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个能让你在周期性、按键触发或受到伤害时随机传送至其他场景的Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that randomly teleports you to another scene periodically, on key press or on damage.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DebugMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 启用调试工具和功能，如穿墙、无敌、移除及给予物品和能力。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows for debug tools and features like no clip, invincibility, removing and giving items and abilities.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SpeedRunQoL
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个调试用附加组件，为速通练习添加了提升操作便捷性的新按键绑定。目前包含位置保存状态、故障绑定、强制额外乌姆攻击以及辐光快速重载功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A debug Add On that adds new keybinds that are QoL for speedrunning practice. Currently adds Position Save States, Glitched Binds, Force Extra Uumuu attack and radiance quick reload

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MoreSaves
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许无限存档。通过 Mod 菜单提供备份/恢复、重命名、锁定及编辑存档数值等功能。注意：编辑当前正在进行的存档将立即在游戏中生效。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows for infinite saves. Uses modmenu to provide other features such as backup/restore, rename, lock and edit values in saves. Note: Editing the current save you are in now takes effect in game

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Gorb Plus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为戈布战斗增加额外攻击方式的模组：飞剑弹幕。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that adds an additional attack when fighting gorb: a nail barrage.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKMP HealthDisplay
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个HKMP的附加模组，需要依赖HkmpPouch。可在公共服务器上使用。用于显示其他玩家的生命值数量。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An addon for HKMP that uses HkmpPouch. Works on the public server.Displays the amount of health other players have

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Gravity Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为所有物体添加重力效果
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds gravity to all objects

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GlassSoul
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让你一击必死。同时在 Mod 菜单中添加选项，每额外增加一点生命值，造成的伤害就提高 1 点。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes you die in one hit. Also adds option in modmenu to increases damage dealt by 1 for each extra health

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Toggle Rando Split Options
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是“可切换绑定”模组的扩展。它为绑定列表新增了分裂之爪、分裂斗篷和诅咒之刃。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An extension to the mod Toggleable bindings. It adds split claw, split cloak and cursed nail to the binding list.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hide Mod List
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你隐藏模组列表，或减少模组列表在屏幕上占用的空间。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows you to hide your mod list or reduce the space the mod list takes on the screen.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Additional Challenge
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个让你能使用46种不同效果来增加游戏挑战性的Mod。共有4种效果类型（持续型、冷却型、Boss攻击型、敌人跟随型），可通过Mod菜单启用。此外还包含混沌模式，会随机周期性触发各种效果。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that allows you to use 46 different effects to make your game more challenging. There are 4 types of effects (Persistent, Cooldown, Boss Attack, Enemy Follow) that can be enabled from modmenu. There is also a choas mode that randomly selects effects to happen periodically.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Poorly Translated
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 劣质翻译版《空洞骑士》。游戏内所有文本均经过一连串谷歌翻译处理。支持英语、德语、西班牙语、法语、意大利语及中文。注意：英语翻译自1.4版本起已重新调整，使其翻译质量更加糟糕。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Poorly Translated Hollow Knight. All text in the game is run through a chain of google translates. Available in English, German, Spanish, French, Italian and Chinese. Note: the English translations were revamped from the 1.4 version to be translated even more poorly

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKMirror
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个核心模组，让访问 PlayerData、使用反射以及 on/il 钩子变得更加便捷。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A core mod that makes it easier to access PlayerData, use reflection, and on/il hooks.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ControllerFixes
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 修复了一些控制器问题并增加了相关功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Fixes some controller issues and adds related features.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NoDying
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个简单的模组，让你的生命值不会低于1点。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A simple mod that doesn't allow your health to go below 1 health

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: WeaverCore
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: WeaverCore 核心模组，为诸如《地狱之王格林》和《腐化之亲》等模组提供必要支持。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Core mod required for mods built with WeaverCore, such as Inferno King Grimm and Corrupted Kin

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Inferno King Grimm
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个大幅强化梦魇之王格林，使其变为多阶段战斗的Mod。同时包含可在主菜单配置的困难模式。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that significantly buffs Nightmare King Grimm into a multi-phase fight. It also includes a hard mode that can be configured on the main menu

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Corrupted Kin
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个大幅改变失落近亲Boss战的Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that significantly changes up the Lost Kin bossfight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Crystal Machinist
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个大幅改变愤怒守卫者Boss战的Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that significantly changes up the Enraged Guardian bossfight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: More Godhome Space
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为诸神堂区域新增第三层，以便容纳更多模组添加的 Boss。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a third floor to the Hall of Gods area so more modded bosses can be added

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Ancient Aspid
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为《空洞骑士》制作的模组，在王国边缘添加了一场全新的、具有挑战性的Boss战。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod for Hollow Knight that adds a brand new, challenging bossfight to Kingdom's Edge

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKMP
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 《空洞骑士》多人联机模组允许玩家创建游戏房间，并邀请其他玩家加入他们的冒险旅程。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Hollow Knight Multiplayer allows people to host games and let others join them in their adventures.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKMP Prop Hunt
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为HKMP增加道具捉迷藏模式的多人游戏扩展。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An HKMP add-on that adds Prop Hunt to multiplayer games.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKVR
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在虚拟现实中游玩《空洞骑士》。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Play Hollow Knight in virtual reality.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Enemy HP Bar
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为游戏中的所有敌人和 Boss 添加可更换皮肤的血量条。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds skinnable HP bars to every enemies and bosses in the game.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MagicUI
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个核心模组，用于帮助其他模组构建用户界面。本身不提供任何功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A core mod to help other mods build UIs. Does nothing on its own.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ConnectionMetadataInjector
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个核心模组，允许像 RandoStats 和 MapModS 这样的随机化补充模组从连接中获取自定义元数据，而无需硬性依赖。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A core mod to allow randomizer-supplemental mods like RandoStats and MapModS to get custom metadata from connections without requiring hard dependencies.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandoStats
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化辅助模组，在完成界面提供详细的检查与获取统计数据。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A randomizer-supplemental mod that provides detailed check and obtain stats on the completion screen.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MajorItemByAreaTracker
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化连接模组，新增了带有半剧透功能的随机化游戏模式，并内置游戏内追踪器。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A randomizer connection that adds a semi-spoiler randomizer game mode with an in-game tracker.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandoChecksCounter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，提供已检查位置的实时计数器。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that provides a live counter of locations checked.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: TheRealJournalRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4 的附加模组，新增了随机化所有其他猎人日志条目的选项。在 Randomizer 4 的连接菜单中激活。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizer 4 addon that adds the option to randomize all other Hunter's Journal entries. Activate in the Connections menu of Randomizer 4.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandoSettingsManager
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，重新实现并扩展了随机化器的设置共享与预设管理功能，并提供了对连接模组的丰富支持。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that reimplements and extends Randomizer's settings sharing and preset management with rich support for connection mods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ModTerminal
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为 DebugMod 添加了一个游戏内终端，用于输入指令和作弊代码。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds an in-game terminal for entering commands and cheats as a DebugMod addon.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ICDebug
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个 ModTerminal 的附加组件，添加了与 ItemChanger 相关的命令。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A ModTerminal addon which adds commands related to ItemChanger.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MoreLocations
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Randomizer 4 的附加模组，为随机化模式添加了多种地点。在 Randomizer 4 的“连接”菜单中激活。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizer 4 addon that adds assorted locations to the randomizer. Activate in the Connections menu of Randomizer 4.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ICPlandoTools
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为 plando 作者添加了多种实用工具。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds assorted utilities for plando authors.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GhostHunter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个在多人游戏中显示其他玩家敌人位置的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that shows the positions of other player's enemies during multiplay.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EmoteWheel
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个允许使用自定义表情的模组（若服务器安装了HkmpPouch，则多人游戏时也可使用）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that allows using custom emotes (also works during multiplay if the server has HkmpPouch).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MultiplayerEvents
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个增加多人互动功能的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that adds some Multiplayer interactions.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HkmpPouch
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于可选网络功能的 HKMP 附加组件的依赖模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A dependency mod for optional hkmp addons with networking.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Satchel
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 背包是一种袋子，这个背包里装有供其他模组使用的酷炫物品。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Satchel is a bag, this one has cool stuff for other mods to use.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Custom Knight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 支持玩家、敌人及区域重制的皮肤模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Supports Skins for Player, Enemies and Area overhauls

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Asymmetric Knight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 自定义骑士附加组件，允许左右方向的骑士精灵图不同。添加 Knight_left.png、Sprint_left.png 和 Unn_left.png 即可使用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Custom Knight Addon that allows left and right looking knight sprites to be different.Add a Knight_left.png, Sprint_left.png and Unn_left.png to use.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandomCompanions
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 自定义骑士扩展包，使幼体与织者幼虫可使用所有可用皮肤。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Custom Knight Addon that allows hatchlings and weaverlings to use all available skins

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SmolKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许改变骑士的大小
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows changing size of the knight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: All4Love
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 博爱众生。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Love 4 All.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SmashKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 根据剩余生命值改变骑士的操作方式。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Changes Knight handling based on health remaining.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ESoulLink
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个口袋模组，使敌人在HKMP服务器上共享生命值。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Pouch Mod that makes enemies share health over HKMP server.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ModScript
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许使用 JavaScript 编写脚本来修改游戏。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows writing scripts in JavaScript to mod the game.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKmote
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在多人游戏中使用表情
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Use emotes during multiplayer

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hat
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 戴上帽子
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Wear Hats

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Memesong
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在游玩时播放一些梗音频片段（可添加或移除片段以适配直播环境）
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Play some meme audio clips as you play (can add or remove clips to make stream friendly)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GrubTrain
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 幼虫伙伴
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Grubs as Companions

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Konpanion
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个小骑士伙伴
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A tiny knight companion

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Glass Cannon Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一击必杀，包括你自己。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes everything one shot, including you

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FrogCore
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 包含辅助工具的库模组，用于添加日志条目、NPC、商店，以及许多用于编辑和创建精灵集合与动画的 tk2d 辅助工具。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Library mod containing helpers for adding journal entries, npcs, shops and many tk2d helpers for editing and creating sprite collections and animations.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomKnightSuperAnimationAddon
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 自定义骑士超级动画附加组件
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许插入自定义动画精灵表。如需导出精灵表，请使用 https://github.com/RedFrog6002/sseadv
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows inserting custom spritesheets for animations. To export spritesheets, use https://github.com/RedFrog6002/sseadv

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Unity Explorer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 供模组开发者使用的实用工具，用于查看和编辑游戏结构。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Useful tool for mod developers to view and edit how the game is structured.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Fast Travel
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 点击地图即可在圣巢内任意传送。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Travel anywhere within Hallownest by clicking on the map.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Game Object Dump
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许从场景中的游戏对象提取图集、精灵和音频片段。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows extraction of atlases, sprites, and audio clips from game objects in the scene.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Gatling Aspid
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让原始飞蝇装备加特林机枪；提供配置选项。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes primal aspids wield gatling miniguns; configuration options available.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Aspid Queen
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在诸神堂中添加一场原始阿斯匹德 Boss 战。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a primal aspid boss fight to the Hall of Gods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SkipToRadiance
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让空洞骑士在败给辐光后直接进入第四阶段。适用于练习模组辐光，或者只是懒得反复打空洞骑士。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes HK instantly go to phase 4 after dying to The Radiance. Useful for practicing modded Radiance or just if you're too slack to fight HK over and over.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Toggleable Bindings
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加了随时单独开启/关闭神居束缚的功能，并让其他开发者更容易创建自定义束缚。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds the ability to activate/deactivate individual Godhome bindings at any time and lets other developers create custom bindings easier.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HollowPoint
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为玩家添加一把枪，并重新设计护符与技能，使其围绕枪械使用的概念展开。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Gives the player a gun, reworks charms and abilities to play around the concept of gun usage

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Golden Godhome
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为神居中的 Boss 重新上色，增加更多金色花纹与细节。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Reskins bosses in the Godhome to have more golden designs and details

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hall of Gods Extras
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在万神殿中添加了空洞骑士和辐光。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds The Hollow Knight and The Radiance to the Hall of Gods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Custom Trial
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许为愚人斗兽场创建自定义试炼。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows creation of custom trials for the Colosseum of Fools.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SilkSong (but not really)
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许玩家扮演大黄蜂。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows the player to play as hornet.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Discord Rich Presence
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 原名 "HollowKnightDRPC"，此模组会在你的 Discord 个人资料（点击用户名时）中显示详细的游戏状态。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Formerly known as "HollowKnightDRPC", this mod adds detailed game status to your Discord profile (when clicked on the username).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Aspidnest
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加了许多无法杀死的敌人，如原始阿司匹德、水晶猎人、卢德尔、螳螂佩特拉、蜂巢士兵、蜂巢守卫、斯奎特、苔藓蝇、福鲁克费和长枪哨兵，它们会跟随你穿越整个圣巢。该模组可在模组选项页面中根据个人喜好进行配置。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds many unkillable enemies such as Primal Aspids, Crystal Hunters, Loodles, Mantis Petras, Hive Soldiers, Hive Guardians, Squits, Mossflies, Flukefeys and Lance Sentries that follow you in the entirety of Hallownest. This mod is configurable to your own liking in the options page of this mod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Osmi
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为其他 Mod 提供实用功能的库 Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library mod providing utilities for other mods

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GodSeekerPlus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 多种调整与实用工具，助你优化神居体验。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Various tweaks and utilities to enhance your Godhome experience

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CompanionCloth
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让布蕾尔一路陪伴你，与你并肩作战。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Let Cloth accompany and fight with you all the way

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HealthShare
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让部分Boss共享生命值，API部分已迁移至Osmi
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Let some bosses use shared health, API part has moved to Osmi

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Everwatchers
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个基于守望者骑士的模组Boss，让你能同时与所有骑士战斗，并增加更多数量。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod boss based on Watcher Knights, allowing you to fight all of them simutanuously and add more of them

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: TribeOfBattle
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 基于战斗姐妹和背叛领主设计的Boss。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A boss based on Sisters of Battle and Traitor Lord

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Crystalblobbles
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 基于奥波布勒斯的 Boss
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A boss based on Oblobbles

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ContinueCountdown
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在继续游戏时添加倒计时功能
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a countdown upon continuing

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CharmPreset
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个允许保存和加载护符预设的模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that allows saving and loading charm presets

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DoubleJumpFix
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 修复双跳有时无法正确取消这一臭名昭著Bug的Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod to fix the notorious bug that the double jump is sometimes not properly canceled

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: No Particles
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 禁用大部分粒子效果。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Disables most of the particle effects.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AlreadyEnoughPlayMaker
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个针对 PlayMaker FSM 的优化模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A optimization mod for PlayMaker FSMs.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: WebPCodec
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为 Texture2D 添加 WebP 编解码支持
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: WebP codec support for Texture2D

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FLACCodec
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为 AudioClip 提供 FLAC 编解码器支持
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: FLAC codec support for AudioClip

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Vanilla Map Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将所有物品/地点添加到现有地图中。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds all items/locations to the existing map.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GeoHunger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 你逐渐失去吉欧，当吉欧为0时则逐渐失去生命值。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: You gradually lose geo and gradually lose health at 0 geo.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Pantheons Hit Counter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 自动统计万神殿中的命中次数。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Counts hits in pantheons automatically.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hit Counter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许创建自定义计数器来统计命中次数。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allow creating custom counters for counting hits.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DoubleRadiance
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 你可以同时与两个辐光战斗，它们的生命值共享。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: You can battle with two radiance at same time ,their hp is shared.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomImage
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 你可以修改一些精灵图。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: You can change some sprites.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ThecurseofSly
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 当你获得吉欧时，你会受到伤害或死亡。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: When you get geo,you will get damage or die.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FuryMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个Mod：如果你装备了“坠落之怒”，你的生命值将变为1，并且可以使用该技能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod if you equipped Fury of Fallen,you will be 1 health and can use it

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ReverseKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 骑士……看起来有点奇怪……
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The knight... look a little strange...

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Fragile Purse
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 受到攻击时会掉落吉欧，并可在设置中开启无吉欧时被击中即死亡。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes you drop geo whenever you get hit, and has a setting to kill you if you get hit without any geo

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DeathCounter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个炫酷的死亡计数器
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A cool DeathCounter

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DecorationMaster
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个通过增加尖刺和锯子来提升区域难度的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod for making area harder by adding spike and saw

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKTracker
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 追踪玩家数据。最常用于在直播中显示技能/护符。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Tracks player data. Most frequently used to display abilities/charms during streams

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FragileStrengthForNailArts
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许脆弱/不碎力量增加骨钉技艺的伤害。原作者：TTacco
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows Fragile / Unbreakable Strength to increase Nail Art damage. Originally by TTacco

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ParryKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 可格挡的敌人仅能通过格挡造成伤害。只有法术才能伤害其他敌人。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Enemies who can be parried only take damage from parries. Only spells can damage other enemies.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PaperKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 当物体旋转时，精灵会以纸片旋转效果进行动画。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Sprites are animated with a paper-spinning effect when objects turn.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Abskoth
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为无上辐光战斗添加无敌马科斯怪物的游戏模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A gameplay mod that adds invincible Markoths to the Absolute Radiance fight.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: QuirrelBoat
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个让奎若在蓝湖事件后仍可互动的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod which makes Quirrel interactable after the events at Blue Lake.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoBoard
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 游戏内宾果板显示。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: In-game bingo board display.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKTool Legacy
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个库模组。不再维护！！！**如果导致游戏崩溃，这属于正常现象，原因未知**
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library mod.No longer maintained!!!**If it crashes your game, this is normal and the reason is unknown**

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKTool
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个库模组。（不支持 Linux）
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library mod. (Linux not supported)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ShieldParry
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许玩家在游戏中使用护盾
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows player to use shield in the game

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Backdash
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许玩家在游戏中使用后撤步
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows player to use back dash in the game

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ChangeHud
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个模组，让你可以在同一模式下使用不同类型的界面。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod let you can use different kinds of huds in same mode.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: QuirrelFlower
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 给奎若的一份小礼物
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A little gift for qurriel

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: UnityExplorerPlus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为 UnityExplorer 添加功能的模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that adds functionality to UnityExplorer

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Dead Cells Barrel Launcher
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将骑士的武器改为桶式发射器
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Change the knight's weapon to Barrel Launcher

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKTimer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一款适用于1.5版本的游戏内计时器模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An in game timer mod for 1.5

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SeedSummon
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个可以召唤生命种子的模组！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod you can summon lifeseed!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Negative Nail
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让你的骨钉造成负伤害，迫使你依赖法术。建议搭配敌人血量条 Mod 游玩。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes your nail do negative damage forcing you to rely on spells. Recommended you play with Enemy HP Bar mod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DumbEnemy
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使敌人及其攻击隐形
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Make Enemy and their attack invisible

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CountDownForLife
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 当倒计时归零时，你将受到惩罚。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: When CountDown went to zero,you will be punished

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomJournal
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于自定义日志图片的 CK 附加模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A CK addon mod to custom journal image

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Dead Cells The Queen
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 该模组已废弃且不再维护，请使用“Dead Cells Bosses”。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The mod has been abandoned and is no longer maintained, please use 'Dead Cells Bosses'

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Dead Cells Bosses
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将《死亡细胞》的Boss加入《空洞骑士》
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add Dead Cells' Bosses to Hollow Knight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Dead Cells Time Keeper
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 死亡细胞 时光守护者
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加计时者雕像
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add TimeKeeper statue

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ShadeControl
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个调试增强模组，让你可以控制暗影法术。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A DebugAddition make you can control shade spell

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomAudio
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个空洞骑士模组，可以替换某些音频。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod can replace some kind of audio

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Zote Killer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你在竞技场中击杀左特
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows you to kill the Zote in the Colosseum

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Cyclone Throws
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你将旋风斩作为远程武器投掷
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows you to throw the Cyclone as a ranged weapon

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Mirrored Hallownest
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将整个《空洞骑士》地图镜像翻转。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mirrors the entire Hollow Knight map

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Archipelago
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 启用与 Archipelago 多世界系统的联机游玩。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Enables play with the Archipelago multiworld system.
