ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Archipelago Map Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个与 Archipelago 多世界随机化器兼容的 RandoMapMod 转换版本。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A conversion of RandoMapMod that works with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GreatChampion
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 失败冠军的模组Boss
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Modboss for failed champion

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Cyclone Real Combat
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除了学习旋风斩的过场动画，改为真实战斗。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removed the learn Cyclone cutscene in and replaced it with real combat

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: OrbTracker
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 指向最近的耳语根球体，并统计你已获取的数量。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Points an arrow to the closest Whispering Root orb, and counts how many you have gotten.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomPantheon
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个在神居添加额外 Boss 门的 Mod，Boss 序列由你自己决定。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod add an extra boss door in God Home,BossSequence decided by yourself .

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKMP.ModDiff
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: HKMP 插件，用于检查客户端与服务器之间的模组列表。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: HKMP Addon for checking mod lists between Clients and Servers.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKMP.CheckSave
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: HKMP 玩家存档检查插件
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: HKMP Addon for checking player save

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandomCharm
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》Mod，每次进入场景时随机更换你装备的护符（包括 Transcendence 新增的护符）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A HollowKnight mod change charm you equipped each scene in random(include Transcendence new charms)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Uumuu Plus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 乌姆乌姆已略微增强
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Uumuu has been slightly enhanced

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: press g to dab
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 按下 G 键，小骑士就会跳起“达布舞”。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: press g and the knight will dab

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Inputs Recheck
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在任何骑士状态变化时重新检测按住按钮，若按钮在可用前已按下且仍处于按住状态，则会触发该动作。基于Phenomenol的Input Buffers模组，但采用完全不同的逻辑实现。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Rechecks for the held buttons on any Knight state change, so the action is triggered even if the button was pushed down before it was available, if the button is still held down. Based on Input Buffers mod by Phenomenol, but with completely different logic.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Input Buffers
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许为骑士的每个动作缓冲输入。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows for buffering inputs for every knight action.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PathOfPureVessel
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在痛苦之路的尽头与纯粹容器战斗
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Battle with PV at the end of POP

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Fennel
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将《莫莫多拉：月下遐想》中的茴香战斗移植到《空洞骑士》中。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Ports the Fennel fight from Momodora Reverie Under the Moonlight into Hollow Knight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Propeller Knight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将《铲子骑士》中的螺旋桨骑士加入《空洞骑士》。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds Propeller Knight from Shovel Knight to Hollow Knight.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Cagney Carnation
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 《空洞骑士》Mod，添加了来自《茶杯头》的卡格尼·康乃馨 Boss。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Hollow Knight mod that adds Cagney Carnation boss from Cuphead.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Fake Peppino
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加了来自《披萨塔》的虚假佩皮诺 Boss。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds Fake Peppino boss from Pizza Tower.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Any Radiance 3.0
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 辐光 3.0
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Any Radiance 3.0

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Rando Vanilla Tracker
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化4的附加组件，用于追踪非随机化物品。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizer 4 add-on for tracking non-randomized items.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKMP Tag
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为HKMP添加标签游戏模式的扩展。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An HKMP addon that adds the tag game-mode.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: The Glimmering Realm
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 新增一种游戏模式，将圣巢的地图布局、物品和背景故事彻底重塑为一个全新的探索世界——微光领域！加入Discord社区：https://discord.gg/wP2FFY6uAB
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a game mode that changes the layout, items and lore of Hallownest into a whole new world to explore - the Glimmering Realm! Join the Discord at https://discord.gg/wP2FFY6uAB

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Convenient Path of Pain
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这个模组让每次用骨钉击中痛苦之路的灵魂图腾或翼兵时，都会完全填满你的灵魂容器。目前该效果不适用于骨钉技艺。感谢SFGrenade让这个模组兼容非原版的图腾和翼兵。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod makes it so whenever you strike a Path of Pain Soul Totem or a Wingsmould with your nail it will fully refill your Soul Vessel. Currently this does not work with Nail Arts. Thank you to SFGrenade for making this compatible with non vanilla Totems and Wingsmoulds

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Godhome Win Loss Tracker
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在诸神堂和万神殿中追踪胜/负记录及命中统计。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Tracks win/loss and hit stats in Hall of Gods and Pantheons.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Empty Menu
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加一个空白菜单界面。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds an empty menu screen.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Brothers of Battle
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 与伟大剑术大师斯莱训练的兄弟战斗
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: fight the brothers who where trained by the great nailsage sly

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Lore Master
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为石碑和特定NPC添加能力。与Lore Rando不兼容！如果你只对随机位置感兴趣，请改用Lore Randomizer。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds abilities to lore tablets and certain npc. Not compatible with Lore Rando! If you're only interested in the rando locations, please use Lore Randomizer instead.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Bomber Knight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 新增炸弹能力，以及几个新护符和自定义“Boss”。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a bomb ability, along a few new charms and custom "bosses".

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: KorzUtils
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为其他模组提供实用功能的库模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Library mod that provide useful functions for other mods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LoreCore
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加了一系列与背景故事相关的物品更换器位置和物品。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a bunch of lore related Item Changer locations and items.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Lore Randomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化4连接，添加了一系列与背景故事相关的物品和地点。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizer 4 connection that adds a bunch of lore related items and locations.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Extra Rando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化4与杂项设置连接。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizer 4 connection with miscellaneous settings.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Arcade Knight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加了一些小游戏。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds some minigames.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: TheHuntIsOn
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一款用于猎人追踪的模组。提供模块来改变游戏对猎人和速通玩家的影响方式。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod for manhunting. Provides modules to change how the game affects hunter and speedrunner.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Trial of Crusaders
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一款受《死亡细胞》、《以撒的结合》和《蓝王子》启发的Roguelike模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A rogue-like mod inspired by Dead Cells, Binding of Isaac and Blue Prince.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Infection Bomb
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 每次你杀死一只感染（或任意）虫子时，都会召唤辐光。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Spawns radiance whenever you kill an infected(or any) bug

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BugPrince
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个随机化4连接模组，将《蓝王子》的机制与《空洞骑士》的过渡随机化相结合。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer 4 connection which combines Blue Prince mechanics with Hollow Knight transition randomizer.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DarknessRandomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于随机化圣巢黑暗角落的Rando 4连接模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Rando 4 connection to randomize the dark corners of Hallownest.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Mimicpocalypse
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 2025 年幼虫节 Plando 的附加模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An add-on mod for the Grub Day 2025 Plando.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Knight of Nights
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为2025年万圣节Plando制作的Mod，包含部分随机化整合功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod for the Holloween 2025 plando, with some rando integration.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MoreDoors
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为空洞骑士随机Mod 4添加更多锁住的门，遍布圣巢各处。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Rando 4 connection which adds more locked doors to Hallownest.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PurenailCore
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Purenail 模组的通用工具与互操作支持
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Common utilities and interop for Purenail mods

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Scattered and Lost
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 以《蔚蓝》为主题的内容模组，扩展了布雷塔的小屋。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Celeste-themed content mod, expanding Bretta's hut

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Sein
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Custom Knight 皮肤“Ori”的配套模组，添加了专属特效。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Companion mod for the Custom Knight skin "Ori", adding specialized effects

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SpicyRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化模式中特定部分的多种难度提升
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Various difficulty increases in specific parts of rando

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SpoilerViewerMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 提供一个Java图形界面，用于浏览随机或计划通关的剧透日志。需要安装Java运行环境。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Provides a Java GUI for navigating the spoiler log of randos or plandos. Requires Java to be installed.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: TreasureHunt
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于半剧透模式的随机化4连接。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer 4 connection fro a semi-spoiler format.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: UnRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个 Rando 4 连接补丁，用于修复随机物品的获取顺序。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Rando 4 connection which fixes the order in which rando items are obtained.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MapChanger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 地图模组库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library for map mods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandoMapMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 世界地图的随机化4全面重制，用于帮助查找物品和过渡检查点。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer 4 overhaul of the World Map to help find item and transition checks.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Twister Indicator
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 当装备法术扭曲者护符时，为你的灵魂槽添加灰色色调（可自定义）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a gray tint (can be customised) to your soul bar when you can use spells with the Spell Twister charm

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Carefree Grimm
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你同时拥有无忧旋律和格林之子
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows you to have Carefree Melody and Grimmchild at the same time

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Sit Button
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 按下按钮即可在任何地方坐下
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes it possible to sit anywhere with a button press

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomKnightPlus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为自定义骑士提供条件皮肤支持的模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that provides conditional skin support for Custom Knight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NoSpiders
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除深巢前景中蜘蛛的模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod to remove the spiders in the foreground of deepnest

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Curse Randomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化4连接，新增额外诅咒选项。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizer 4 connection that adds additional cursed options.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NoWalkOfShame
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在你死亡的房间内重生（跳过暗室/梦境房间/竞技场）
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Respawns you in the room you died in (skipping darkrooms/dreamrooms/colosseum)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Always Furious
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 装备时，堕落之怒始终生效。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Fury of the Fallen is always active while equipped

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Charm Overhaul
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将护符大修移植至1.5版本。重新平衡并重制了多种护符，同时新增了协同效果。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Port of Charm Overhaul to 1.5. Rebalances and reworks various Charms and adds new synergies

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Charm Changer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你自定义部分护符效果的强度
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Lets you customize the strength of some Charm effects

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Disable Enemy Geo
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 敌人不再掉落吉欧。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Enemies no longer drop Geo

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Dream Warpers
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 戈布、长者胡和无眼在受到伤害后，100%概率传送。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Gorb, Elder Hu, and No Eyes teleport 100% of the time after being damaged.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GPZ Precepts
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: GPZ每次受到伤害时，会随机显示一条戒律。显示期间他处于无敌状态。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: GPZ displays a random precept each time he takes damage. He is invulnerable while it is displayed

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Grimmchild Anywhere
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 格林之子会在梦魇之王格林（TMG）和纯粹梦魇之王格林（NKG）的战斗中生成。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Grimmchild can spawn during TMG and NKG fights

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Infinite AbsRad Phases
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使选定的绝对辐射阶段变为无限
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes the selected AbsRad phase infinite

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Menderbug Options
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 选择修理虫的生成几率、死亡后是否重生，以及是否需要打破标志。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Choose Menderbug's spawn chance, whether he respawns after dying, and whether the sign must be broken

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Nailmaster's Pride
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 骨钉大师的荣耀会禁用普通骨钉攻击，但会解锁所有骨钉技艺并使其自动蓄力。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Nailmaster's Glory prevents regular Nail attacks but grants all Nail Arts and automatically charges them

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Crafted Town
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 《工匠小镇》新增了一个区域、多种法术变体以及部分护符升级（目前为 Alpha 测试阶段）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The Crafted Town adds a new location, several spell alternatives and some charm upgrades (on alpha as of now).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Upgraded DreamShield
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将梦之护盾变成一种可以阻挡激光的弓。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Turns the Dream Shield into a bow of sorts that can block lasers.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DreamShield Coop
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许第2或第3名玩家以梦之盾或格林之子克隆体形式进行合作的Mod。支持其他Mod轻松添加更多内容。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod that allows coop with a 2nd or 3rd player as a dreamshield or grimmchild clone. Support for other mods to easily add more.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Boss Attacks
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在诸神堂中训练与特定 Boss 攻击及其他内容的 Boss 战斗。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Train boss fights in Hall of Gods against specific boss attacks and more.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Pet
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 给予跟随英雄的宠物。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Gives pets that follow the hero.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RCPathfinder
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: RandomizerCore 的寻路库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A pathfinder library for RandomizerCore.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SlantedKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 骑士会根据其生命值倾斜。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The knight is slanted depending on its HP.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AspyCompanion
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将格林之子替换为阿斯皮。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Replaces Grimmchild with Aspy.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Soul Nail on Heavy Blow
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 装备沉重之击时，每五次攻击会生成一个暗影分身，对附近敌人发动锐影突袭。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: With Heavy Blow on every 5 hits you create a sibling that sharp shadows a nearby enemy.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKRoomLogger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将场景切换记录到文件中。Windows 专属软件 HKAT 的配套模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Logs scene transitions to a file. Companion mod to Windows-only software HKAT.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Text Randomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机打乱《空洞骑士》中的所有文本
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Shuffles around all text in Hollow Knight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Disable Achievements
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 阻止游戏在游戏内及所有平台（Steam、GoG等）上发放成就。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Prevents the game from awarding achievements, both in-game and on all platforms (Steam, GoG etc.)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: TheGloryOfBeingAFoolRandomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化成为愚者的荣耀。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizes the glory of being a Fool.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Grass Randomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随机化4连接，将草丛加入随机化物品和位置的池中。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Randomizer 4 connection that adds grass to the pool of randomized items and locations.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GrassCore
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个与草相关活动的核心模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A core mod for grass-related activities.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoSync
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个自动在 bingosync.com 上标记方格的《空洞骑士》Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that automatically marks squares on bingosync.com

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoAdvancedCustomGeneration
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个允许使用BingoSync生成更复杂宾果板的Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod allowing for more complex board generation using BingoSync

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BingoGoalPackGrubDay
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个目标包，为2026年幼虫节宾果活动新增6个目标的自动标记功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A goal pack that adds automarking for 6 new goals for the 2026 Grub Day bingy events

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Soul Paladin
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个加速灵魂战士战斗并修改其攻击方式的 Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that speeds up the Soul Warrior fight and modifies it's attacks.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NoBlur
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 擦亮你的眼镜，看清《空洞骑士》背景物体，不再模糊。提供移除模糊平面、雾气物体和薄雾物体的选项。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Clean your glasses and see Hollow Knight's background objects without blur. Options for removing Blur planes, Fog objects, and Haze objects.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Keep Me Geo
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 不想在死亡时失去一切而焦虑？那么“保留我的吉欧”将消除你的烦恼！死亡时，你将不再失去超出你意愿的吉欧！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Don't want the anxiety of losing everything when you die? Then Keep Me Geo will take your worries away! You won't lose any more geo than you want to when you die!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Stop Hitting Yourself
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 夜晚变得笨拙
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The night becomes clumsy

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ShyKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除神居竞技场和愚人斗兽场的观众。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes the audience from Godhome arenas and Colosseum of Fools

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EasySoulRefill
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 每次重生、坐在长椅上或进入梦境 Boss 场地时，立即恢复你的灵魂计量（兼容苍白庭院 Mod）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Instantly refills your soul meter whenever you respawn, sit on a bench or enter a dream boss arena (compatible with Pale Court)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LessVisualNoise
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为辅助功能减少游戏中的视觉效果。仍在开发中。建议与无粒子效果模组配合使用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Reduces amount of visuals in the game for accessibility purposes. Still in development. Recommended to use along with the No Particles mod

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Legacy Charm Costs
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个将快速劈砍和虫巢之息恢复至旧版槽位消耗（2槽位）的模组。提供选项，可在模组禁用后使更改在已打开的存档中持续生效。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that reverts Quick Slash and Flukenest to their older notch costs (2 notches). Offers the option to make the changes persistent on opened saves after being diabled.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Static Camera
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使用按键绑定锁定摄像机位置。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Locks the camera in place with a keybind.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Vessel May Cry
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个彻底重制骑士动作模组以匹配维吉尔的Mod。建议阅读Mod页面。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that overhauls the Knight's moveset to match Vergil's. Reading the mod page is recommended.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AbsRad Configurable Attacks
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许配置绝对辐光攻击频率。支持同时作用于多个辐光。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows configuration of Absolute Radiance's attack frequencies. Works with multiple Radiances at once.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AbsRad Teleport Control
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许在无上辐光战斗的平台阶段和最终阶段禁用传送位置。支持同时处理多个无上辐光。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows disabling teleport locations in the platform and final phases of the Absolute Radiance fight. Works with multiple Radiances at once.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Radiance Multiplier
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许同时与最多十个绝对光辉战斗。共享生命值。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows fighting up to ten Absolute Radiances at once. Uses shared HP.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Steady Hands (automap)
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 稳定骑士的双手，使其能在行走时绘制地图（无需在长椅上休息即可自动更新地图）。与其他修改地图的模组（如 VanillaMapMod 或 RandoMapMod）不兼容，这些模组已具备此功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Steadies the Knight's hands so they can draw while walking (updates map automatically without needing to rest at a bench). Not compatible with other map-altering mods like VanillaMapMod or RandoMapMod, which already do this.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Kindred Spirit
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将神居中的巨型苔藓冲锋者雕像替换为绿色小骑士的梦境和非梦境版本。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Replaces the Massive Mosscharger's statue in Godhome with a dream and non dream version of the Greenpath Vessel.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Fart Knight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加放屁攻击。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds fart attack

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ImmortalLight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 绝对辐光模组Boss
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A modboss for Absolute Radiance

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LostFocus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个能在切换标签页时自动暂停并静音游戏的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that automatically pauses and mutes the game when you switch tabs.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKViz
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于记录移动、死亡、装备的护符、使用的能力等多项数据的模组，支持在 hkviz.org 上可视化这些分析数据。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that records analytics like movement, deaths, equipped charms, abilities used and much more to allows visualizing those analytics on hkviz.org

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Nightmare and Void
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将梦魇之王格林与纯粹容器战斗转换为自定义双首领战。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Converts the Nightmare King Grimm fight into a custom duo boss with the Pure Vessel.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CarThingMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 每次玩家挥动骨钉时，都会扔出一辆车。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Throws a car everytime the player swings their nail

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Deez Nuts Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将所有文本替换为“Deez Nuts”。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Replaces all text with Deez Nuts

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CombatRandomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为受诅咒的战斗体验而设计的随机化附加模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer add-on for a cursed combat experience.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FlowerRandomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为花之任务爱好者设计的空洞骑士随机化模组扩展。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight Randomizer add-on for flower quest lovers.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GodhomeRandomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 神居元素的随机化附加组件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Randomizer add-on for Godhome elements.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GrubSpoiler
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为CondensedSpoilerLog添加小幼虫的Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod to add Grubs to CondensedSpoilerLog.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MurderRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为那些憎恨无辜者准备的另一个随机连接。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Another rando connection for those who despise the innocent.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CelesteDash
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将类Celeste的冲刺系统引入空洞骑士
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Bring a Celeste-like dash system into Hollow Knight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RecentItemsDisplayNoGrass
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 最近物品显示 草地随机化 不显示草地
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: RecentItemsDisplay GrassRando notDisplay Grass

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LockResolution
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 锁定游戏内分辨率。失去焦点时开启垂直同步。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Lock Resolution On GamePlay. VSync On LostFocus

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MapSyncMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 同步地图、长椅、战斗、Boss、拉杆、墙壁、地板、门以及其他物品同步模组中的内容。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Sync Map Bench battle boss lever wall Floor door and other on ItemSyncMOD

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BenchDeploy
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使用控制器/键盘部署多个长椅。其他玩家的长椅基于物品同步地图同步模组
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Deploy Multi Bench use controller/keyboard. other player bench on itemsync MapSyncMod

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MetalPipeHM
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个空洞骑士模组，每当骑士挥动骨钉时，就会播放金属管掉落的声音。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A hollow knight mod that plays the metal pipe falling sound whenever the knight swings their nail.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Soul Sovereign
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 对灵魂暴君的战斗进行了重制，使其更具挑战性。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Provides a rework to the Soul Tyrant fight to make it more challenging.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LessHealing
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，增加了可开关的选项，用于移除游戏中的各种治疗方式。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that adds toggleable options that remove various healing methods from the game.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AccessRandomizer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 杂项访问检查的随机化器附加组件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A randomizer add-on for miscellaneous access checks.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Moonside
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 是即非，非即是。在月之侧，这完全说得通。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Yes is No and No is Yes. It makes perfect sense in Moonside.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: UnrestrictedSteelSoul
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个《空洞骑士》模组，在钢魂模式下游玩时，会在梦境/神居区域启用永久死亡机制。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that enables permadeath in dream/godhome zones when playing in steel soul mode.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BossSync
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此 Mod 已废弃，其功能已整合至另一个 Mod（MapSyncMod）。目前正在开发另一个 Mod，用于优化 112% 合作 APB 速通体验，将以 "SpeedrunSync" 为名发布。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod is now obsolete as its features are implemented into another mod (MapSyncMod). Currently working on another mod to polish up some things for 112% Coop APB speedruns that will be released under the name "SpeedrunSync"

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Afterimage Plus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个为骑士和敌人添加可定制残影效果的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that gives customizable afterimages to the Knight and enemies.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RemoveLaggyObjects
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 从场景中移除可能导致严重卡顿的各种物体。同时移除RLO。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes various objects from scenes where they can cause major lag. Also RLO

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Biblically Accurate Lasers
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为辐光与无上辐光战斗添加了一些可配置的激光。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds some configurable lasers to the Radiance and Absolute Radiance fights.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FriendCore
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 实验性（但稳定）的库模组，具备敌人编辑功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Experimental (but stable) library mod with enemy editing capabilities.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: The H.I.V.E
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一款让蜂巢更具挑战性并加入新背景故事的模组！同时包含经典模组Boss“嗡嗡波”的最新版本！建议（非必需）配合使用EnemyHPBar和HueShifter模组。此为《空洞骑士》模组系列的首部作品。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that makes the Hive a little harder, with some new lore! Also includes the newest version of the classic modded boss Buzzbo! Playing with EnemyHPBar and HueShifter is not required, but is recommended. First part of the Hallow Knight mod series.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DoodleBosses
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: HKM社区涂鸦Boss项目的集大成之作。所有Boss现在都变成了可爱的涂鸦风格！艺术家名单可在Readme文件及游戏内查看。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The culmination of the Doodle Boss project of the HKM community. All the bosses are now adorable doodles! Artist credits can be found in the Readme and in-game.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CollectorGlitchRemover
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 防止“瞬间抓取”和“粘脚”收藏家漏洞。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Prevents the "insta-grab" and "sticky feet" Collector glitches.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Casino Knight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 来赌一把吧！在德特茅斯新增了一家赌场，里面设有老虎机，可以让你花掉吉欧。赢取大奖吧！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Lets go gambling! Adds a casino with slot machines into Dirtmouth to spend geo on. Win big!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Rogue
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 类银河城风格的《空洞骑士》万神殿 Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A rogue-like Pantheon of Hallownest mod

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SpellChanger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个旨在让其他模组更轻松编辑法术和骨钉技艺的库模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library mod that aims to allow other mods to edit spells and nail arts more easily.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ExtraSpells
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个添加了若干新法术和剑技的模组。在背包中选择法术即可循环切换。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that adds a handful of new spells and nail arts. Cycle by selecting the spell in the inventory.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Charm Changer Rando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个用于随机化“护符更换器”设置的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod to randomize the settings of Charm Changer

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: QuickDive
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个将快速施法按键重新映射为仅使用下砸技能的 Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that remaps your Quick Cast button to only Dive

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Godhome Elo Counter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个将 ELO 评分系统引入神居的 Mod
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that introduces an ELO rating system to Godhome

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Christmas In Dirtmouth
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 德特茅斯变得热闹非凡！本模组在德特茅斯新增了一家圣诞装饰商店，由新NPC欢愉灵光经营。节日快乐！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Things are getting festive in Dirtmouth! This mod adds a new Christmas decoration shop in Dirtmouth owned by a new NPC, Merrywisp. Happy holidays!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hivesong
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 本模组新增了一个护符“蜂巢之歌”，可提升宠物造成的伤害。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod adds a new charm, Hivesong, which increases the damage dealt by pets.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CharmPatch
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个小型改动合集，旨在优化游戏中部分护符的平衡性。请查看《护符修改器》模组的说明文档以获取推荐配置。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This is a collection of small changes that I think improve the balance of certain charms in the game. Please view Readme for Charm Changer mod recommendations.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ouchyGrass
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 触碰草地会使玩家受伤或死亡。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Touching grass hurts or kills the player.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AllHallownestEnhanced
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个强化了整个圣巢的 Mod。我花了两个半月的时间制作它。它将带你体验初次遇见空洞骑士的乐趣。我希望它能成为《丝之歌》发布前的一道美味替代品。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This is a mod that enhances the entire Hallownest. I spent 2.5 months to make it. It will take you to experience the joy of meeting the Hollow Knight first. I hope it can become a good meal replacement before the release of SilkSong.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LumaflyKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 追踪你已释放的荧光虫数量
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Tracks how many lumaflies you've freed

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FasterIntroSkip
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使跳过开场动画更快。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes skipping the intro cutscenes faster.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Screensaver
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在游戏顶部添加了一个屏幕保护程序。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a screensaver untop of the game.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GrubFriendlyRando
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将幼虫商店的描述改为“一个可爱的小扭扭朋友！”
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Changes the grub shop description to "a cute little wiggly friend!"

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: TextMasher
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 当你按住骨钉、跳跃或聚集键时，自动跳过文本框。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Auto mashes through textboxes if you are holding Nail, Jump or Focus.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BossStatueFramework
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为万神殿添加自定义 Boss 雕像的库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Library for adding custom boss statues to the Hall of Gods.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SpeedChanger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 加速或减慢游戏速度。这是Sanic模组的一个更可定制、更用户友好的版本。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Speed up or slow down your game. A more customisable and user-friendly version of the Sanic mod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GearSwitcher
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个允许你切换预设装备配置，并随时更换护符的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A modification that allows you to switch the prepared equipment patterns, as well as switch the charms at any time.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ReplayLogger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: ReplayLoger 是一个用于验证玩家挑战跑合法性的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: ReplayLoger is a mod that was created to verify the legitimacy of player challenge runs.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GodhomeQoL
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此模组是一个大型工具合集，旨在帮助速通玩家应对挑战任务。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod is a large collection of tools designed to help challenge runners with their tasks.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKBattle
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: HKBattle 是一款《空洞骑士》Mod，用于单人练习以及竞争性的 Boss 和万神殿挑战。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: HKBattle is a Hollow Knight mod for solo practice and competitive boss and Pantheon challenges.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Fishing
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为随机化模式添加钓鱼小游戏
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a fishing minigame to the randomizer

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RomanNumerals
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将所有数字转换为罗马数字系统
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Converts all numbers to the Roman numeral system

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DivineFury
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 该模组新增一个护符：神圣狂怒。该护符将玩家生命值锁定为1点，使"亡者之怒"在辐光级神居战斗中也能生效。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod adds a new charm: Divine Fury. This charm sets the player's health to 1, allowing Fury of the Fallen to be viable in Radiant Godhome battles.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Silksong-Start-Screen
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这是一个《空洞骑士》模组，将游戏标题界面替换为《丝之歌》主题的启动画面。目前该版本仅替换了标志，未替换背景——主要原因是缺乏高质量资源。为获得最佳视觉效果，建议搭配格林剧团背景使用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that replaces the game's title screen with a Silksong-themed start screen. Currently, this version only replaces the logo and does not replace the background—mainly due to the lack of high-quality resources. For the best visual match, it's recommended to use the Grimm background.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandoMapCore
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: RandoMapMod 和 ArchipelagoMapMod 的库文件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A library for RandoMapMod and ArchipelagoMapMod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Smart Nail
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: RandoPlus 的 QoL 模组，可在神居和梦境 Boss 战斗中自动升级你的骨钉。不兼容战斗或诅咒随机模式。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Qol mod for RandoPlus,which auto-upgrades your nail in Godhome and in dream bosses fights.Doesn't work with combat or curse rando.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Pure Vessel Skills
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你使用纯粹容器（Pure Vessel）的攻击招式
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allow you to use Pure Vessel's attacks

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Zen Charm
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加一个护符，让你无需在长椅上就能更换其他护符。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a Charm that allows you to change other charms while not at a bench

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Silksong Healing
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加了一个名为“灵魂爆发”的护符，当玩家拥有99点灵魂时，可一次性回复3格血量，类似《丝之歌》中的机制。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a charm called Soulburst, which allows players to heal 3 masks at once when they have 99 soul, similar to Silksong

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Mask Remover
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 从 HUD 中移除面具。适用于辐光级战斗。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes masks from the HUD. Useful for radiant fights.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Geo Remover
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除 HUD 上的吉欧图标。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes geo icons from the HUD.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Invulnerability Indicator
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为玩家角色在非场景切换、非无敌状态以及已有视觉提示的无敌状态之外的无敌期间，添加一个视觉指示器。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a visual indicator when the player character is invulnerable outside of screen transitions, invincibility, and invulnerability that is already visually indicated.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Collision Glitch Remover
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除基于碰撞的漏洞，例如格鲁兹妈妈墙壁弹跳和收藏家“粘脚”漏洞。与CollectorGlitchRemover功能相同，但修复了所有场景。可与CollectorGlitchRemover一起添加，或替代CollectorGlitchRemover使用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes collision-based glitches such as the Gruz mother wall bounce and Collector "sticky feet" glitch. Works the same way as CollectorGlitchRemover except it fixes every scene. Can be added along with CollectorGlitchRemover or instead of CollectorGlitchRemover.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RainbowShinies
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 使所有发光物品拥有随机颜色
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Makes all shinies have a random color

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ArchitectLegacy
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 空洞骑士关卡编辑器 Architect 的旧版本。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: The old version of Architect, a Hollow Knight level editor.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Architect
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一款空洞骑士关卡编辑模组，通过内置的关卡编辑器和分享功能，轻松制作并分享自定义关卡。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight level editor mod, easily make and share custom levels with an in-game level editor and level sharer.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ItemCreator
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 用于创建自定义物品并显示在背包中的库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Library used to create custom items that show up in the inventory.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FsmSeer
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 按下 F3 时，在物体上方显示当前 FSM 名称和状态。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Shows active FSM names and states above objects when F3 is pressed.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: UltimateChickenKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在《空洞骑士》中实现《超级鸡马》玩法，需使用HKMP与建筑师Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Ultimate Chicken Horse in Hollow Knight, using HKMP and the Architect mod.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ConfigurableMaskDamage
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 修改对骑士造成的伤害量
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Changes the amount of damage dealt to the knight

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ExaltationExpanded
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 由 Xhuis 创作的《Exaltation》模组的粉丝自制补充内容（由 Théodore 移植/更新）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A fan-made supplement to the Exaltation mod created by Xhuis (and ported/updated by Théodore).

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CustomizableAbilities
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你自定义能力的模组：负数和分数骨钉；骨钉击中获得的灵魂量；骨钉冷却时间；伤害（同样支持负数和分数）以及梦之钉获得的灵魂量；法术和其他能力。负伤害会治疗敌人。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod that allows you to customize abilities: negative and fractional nail; the amount of SOUL received from nail hits; nail cooldown; damage (also negative and fractional) and the amount of SOUL received from dream nail; spells and other abilities. Negative damage heals enemies.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: QoLTeleportKit
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: QoL 传送工具包是一款为《空洞骑士》添加便捷传送系统的 Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: QoL Teleport Kit is a Hollow Knight mod that adds a convenient teleportation system.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: WanderersWisdom
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个添加了2个新护符的Mod：流浪者的智慧与流浪者的狡黠。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that adds 2 new charms: Wanderer's Wisdom and Wanderer's Guile.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DashChanger
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你修改冲刺的水平与垂直距离。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows you to change the horizontal and vertical length of the dash.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PlatformingQoL
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 《空洞骑士》平台跳跃体验优化模组，包含碰撞箱可视化与重生动画跳过功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Quality of life improvements for Hollow Knight platforming, including hitbox visualization and respawn animation skipping.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ShowHPOnDeath
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个允许你在死亡后查看生命值的 Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that allows you to watch hp after death

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: OWO_HollowKnight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个允许将 OWO 皮肤触觉设备与《空洞骑士》集成的模组。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that allows the integration of OWO Skin haptic device with HK

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EnchantedMask
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 新增名为“符文”的能力强化道具，可从面具匠处购买。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds new powerups called Glyphs, which can be purchased from the Mask maker.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MetalOST
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将整个圣巢的原声音乐替换为 RYS 制作的定制金属变奏版。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Replaces all of Hallownest’s OST’s with custom metal variants made by RYS.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DPSMeter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这个模组可以让你看到每秒造成的伤害数值，同时也支持显示负伤害。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Mod that allows you to see how much damage you deal per second. Also works with negative damage.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Pale Court Charms
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加苍白王庭的护符。旨在兼容那些无法与主版苍白王庭共同运行的模组。支持随机化模组与超越模组。 请勿与苍白王庭同时使用，因为两个模组会添加相同的护符。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds charms from Pale Court. Made to allow compatibility with mods that don't work with the main Pale Court. Works with Randomizer and Transcendence. Do not use with Pale Court,as both mods add the same charms.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HKMP.VoiceChat
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个HKMP附加组件，增加了（近距离）语音聊天功能。需要安装OpenAL（https://www.openal.org/）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An HKMP addon that adds (proximity) voice chat. Requires OpenAL (https://www.openal.org/) to be installed.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MotionBlur
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加动态模糊效果。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds motion blur

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Less Flashing Lights
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 减少闪烁光效。更多信息请查看说明文件。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Reduces the amount of flashing lights. Check the readme for more info

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Galien Illusionist
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: Modboss。现在竞技场中会出现两个加里安，其中一个是假的。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Modboss. Now there will be two galiens in the arena, one of which is not real.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DanielSteginkUtils
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 包含计算、逻辑和跨模组辅助功能的自定义库。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Custom library with calculations, logic and cross-mod helpers.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: PantheonOfRegions
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 新增万神殿，可同时挑战多个Boss。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds new Pantheon to fight bosses together

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Powerful Shadow Dash
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此模组将暗影冲刺冷却时间设为0。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod set shadow dash cooltime to 0.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Custom Title
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个允许玩家使用自定义头衔的《空洞骑士》Mod。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that allows players to use their custom title

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Nail Destroy Bullet
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 挥动骨钉可以摧毁敌人的子弹。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Swinging the nail will destroy enemies' bullet.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Dash Slash Plus
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除冲刺斩的蓄力要求。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes the charge requirement for Dash Slash.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Shade Lord
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在诸神堂中增加暗影之主作为 Boss。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds the Shade Lord as a boss in the Hall of Gods

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Killable Dreamnail
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加一个名为“锯齿梦境”的护符，允许你用梦之钉造成伤害，伤害取决于你所拥有的梦之精华数量。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add a charm called "Serrated Dream" which allows you to deal damage with dream nail, the damage is depend on the essence you have

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: More Charm Notches
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将你的护符槽数量翻倍，初始拥有6个而非3个，且每找到一件额外护符槽物品将为你增加2个槽位。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Doubles the number of charm notches you have, so that you start wih 6 instead of 3, and every additional charm notch item you find will give you an extra 2 notches.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Uneated Grubs
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 让幼虫之家里的幼虫保持原样，不让幼虫父亲吃掉它们。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Keeps the Grubs in Grubhome without Grubfather eating them.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hide Dialog Text
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 按 F3 键切换对话文本的可见性。未来可能会移除该功能，因为它正在移植到 DebugMod 中。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Toggle dialog text's visibility by pressing F3. May remove in the future as it is porting to DebugMod

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MarkothShield
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此模组将梦之护盾升级为马科斯护盾。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod upgrades the Dreamshield into the Markoth Shield.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AlwaysHazardRespawn
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 死亡后总是在危险重生点复活。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Always respawn at hazard respawn locations after death.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: LaughMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在特定事件发生时播放笑声。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Plays laugh sound on specific events.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Fast World
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 通过改变整个世界的速度（除了你），让你的圣巢更具挑战性！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Making your Hallownest more challenging by changing speed of the entire world, except you!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GeoPots
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 增加推车和木桶被打破时掉落吉欧的几率。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a chance for carts and barrels to drop geo when broken.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GeoBundles
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 将吉欧存入"包裹"中，防止死亡时损失，类似丝之歌中的念珠串。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Store Geo in "bundles" to protect it from loss upon death, similar to rosary strings in silksong.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: BetterCrystalHeart
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为水晶之心增加伤害与充能时间的协同效果与增益。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds synergies and bonuses to Crystal Heart's damage and charge time.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: InfectedHallownest
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为游戏新增一个阶段：击败空洞骑士后，感染将蔓延至整个游戏世界，随机强化敌人。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a new stage to the game: after beating the Hollow Knight, the Infection expands throughout the game, strengthening enemies at random.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Restore NKG Title Card
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 恢复神居梦魇之王格林标题画面
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Restore Godhome NKG Title Card

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RandoSBRCO
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为随机化器添加逻辑，确保给定的护符顺序能够被遵循。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds logic to the randomizer to ensure that a given charm order can be followed

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GodhomeGeo
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 移除阻止吉欧在神居生成的限制。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes the limitation that prevents geo from spawning in Godhome.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ShadeSnail
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 生成一个永恒不灭的暗影，它会一直跟随你。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Spawns an immortal Shade that follows you constantly.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: GripWall
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 减少或消除贴墙时的重力影响。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Reduces or eliminates gravity effect while clinging to a wall.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AllGrubRewardsAtOnce
ml:Manifest.ml:ChineseName: 一次性获得所有咕噜奖励
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 幼虫之父一次性给予所有可用奖励。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Grubfather gives all available rewards in one go.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Nosk Transformation
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 随心所欲化身为诺斯克——在《空洞骑士》中咆哮、吐息、跳跃、捉弄你的朋友们，支持隐身命名和HKMP联机。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Become Nosk at will—roar, spit, leap, and prank your friends in Hollow Knight, with stealth naming and HKMP support.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NoMaps
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 从屏幕上移除地图
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Removes the map from the screen

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: CabbyCodes
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个全面的作弊菜单模组，通过游戏内界面提供对玩家属性、物品栏和游戏状态的控制。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A comprehensive cheat menu mod that provides control over player stats, inventory, and game state through an in-game interface

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: NoGlow
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 切换跟随骑士的微弱光芒。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Toggles the faint glow that follows the Knight around.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Drunk Knight
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为摄像机添加失真和色差效果
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add a sin and chromatic aberration effect to the camera

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DistantGreens Charms
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在《空洞骑士》中添加了一些自定义护符。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds some custom Charms into the Hollow Knight.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ProfanityFilterAddon
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: HKMP 和 SSMP 的服务器端脏话过滤插件，当前采用高性能规则过滤引擎。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Server-side profanity filter addon for HKMP and SSMP. currently uses a high-performance rule-based filtering engine.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ExtraNotchesForExtraCharms
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 此模组会根据你安装的模组护符数量，增加额外的护符槽位。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod adds extra charm notches based on how many mod charms you have installed.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: VoidAndSoul
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 这个模组通过0槽护符“虚空与灵魂”增加了RPG机制。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: This mod adds an RPG mechanic through the 0-notch charm Void & Soul.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Double Bosses
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个（顾名思义）能让每个 Boss 数量翻倍的 Mod（实际上只影响万神殿底排 Boss 以及纯粹容器、梦魇之王、无上辐光、白色防御者）。"享受"这个 Mod 带来的混乱与疯狂吧。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A mod that (as the name suggests) doubles each bosses (actually, only bottom row in hall of gods + PV, NG, AR, WKs). "Enjoy" the mayhem and chaos this mod provides

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MuteBosses
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 通过菜单中的开关来静默Boss战斗音效。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Silences bosses via toggles in the menu

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DreamNailRadiance
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你对辐光使用梦之钉（具体来说是她的腿部）。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Enables you to use the Dream Nail against the Radiance (her legs, specifically)

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SpamDescendingDark
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 延长暗影冲刺的无敌时间，使其可以连续使用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Increases DDark invincibility so it can be used non-stop

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: FuryOfTheBallin
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 护符会在你只剩1格面具时召唤马穆盟友；必须击败马穆才能解锁。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Charm spawns Marmu ally when you are at 1 Mask; must beat Marmu to unlock

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SyncDreamShield
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 同步你的梦之盾与其他HKMP玩家
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Syncs your Dream Shield with other players in HKMP

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: MendBreakables
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 修复某些可破坏物体
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Repairs certain breakable objects

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: AuraRad
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 绝对辐射 Mod Boss
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Absolute Radiance Mod Boss

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: ResurrectionMod
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 为 HKMP 添加倒地状态替代死亡，允许队友复活你。附带可配置的强制重生按键。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds a downed state instead of death, allowing teammates to revive you in HKMP. Features a configurable Force Respawn key.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Vietnamese Lang
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加越南语。空洞骑士越南语化。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Add Vietnamese Language. Hollow Knight Việt Hoá

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: SpriteToggler
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在 F10 键（可配置）上切换设置中定义的对象精灵（默认单个“OC 背景板”）。你可以使用 Unity Explorer 查找对象名称。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Toggles sprites on objects defined in the settings (single "OC Backboard" by default) on F10 (configurable). You can find object names using Unity Explorer

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: EdgeDetection
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个辅助功能模组，为游戏中重要的元素添加可自定义的边缘检测轮廓。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: An accessibility mod that adds customizable edge detection outlines to things that are important for gameplay.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Charm Loadouts
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 允许你在长椅休息时保存和加载最多3个护符配置。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Allows you to save and load up to 3 charm builds while resting at a bench.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RngSync
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个空洞骑士模组，让大量随机数变得可预测。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Hollow Knight mod that makes a lot of RNG deterministic

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Charm Rebalanced
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 点击[查看说明]以了解所有改动。如果您喜欢这个模组，请考虑在GitHub仓库上点个星标，这将帮助更多人发现这个模组！
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Click [View Readme] to see all the changes. If you enjoy the mod, please consider giving the GitHub repository a star, this will help spread the mod to more people!

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Noclip Accuracy
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一个轻量级模组，用于追踪你在无碰撞/练习模式中受到多少次尖刺伤害。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A lightweight mod that tracks how many spike damage hits you take during noclip / practice runs

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Ghost Macro
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 基于场景的碰撞箱录制与回放系统，支持时间轴播放、多次访问记录及类宏操作的幽灵回放功能。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Scene-based hitbox recording and replay system with timeline playback, multi-visit support, and macro-like ghost replays

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Spell Counter
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 多种模式的法术计数器模组：法术模式、休闲模式与连锁索罗戈斯模式
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Spell counter mod with many modes: Spells, Casual and Chain Shorogos

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: RespawnPoint Manager
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 出生点管理器，可跨场景追踪、保存和切换玩家检查点，支持快速重置及自定义出生控制。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Spawnpoint manager that tracks, saves, and switches player checkpoints across scene with quick reset and custom spawn control

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Hallowest
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 《空洞骑士》硬核玩法大修模组。提升游戏难度并重新平衡战斗系统。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Hardcore gameplay overhaul mod for Hollow Knight. Increases difficulty and rebalances combat.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: DynamicRenderScale
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 根据性能动态调整渲染比例。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Dynamically adjusts render scale based on performance.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: HarderAPSettings
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 添加设置以增加AP难度，例如承受额外伤害、降低骨钉伤害，并将辐光替换为绝对辐光。该功能在非群岛存档中同样生效。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds Settings to make APs harder, like take extra damage, do less nail damage, and replaces Radiance with AbsRad. Works in non Archipelago saves too.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: WhatTheMoth
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 一款致敬《西蒙说》的空洞骑士Mod，违抗辐光法官的命令会直接把你传送到辐光竞技场——顺带一提，这个Mod是西班牙语的。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: A Simon Says-inspired Hollow Knight mod where obeying Judge Radiance sends you straight to the Radiance arena, MOD IS IN SPANISH BY THE WAY.

ml:Manifest.ml:Name: Another Location
ml:Manifest.ml:DescriptionCN: 在随机化模式中添加了一个新地点。具体条款与条件可能适用。
ml:Manifest.ml:Description: Adds one location to the Randomizer. Terms and Conditions may apply
